<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8" />
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
        <!-- Replace existing meta tags in <head> -->
        <meta
            name="description"
            content="I&R EMPORIO | Trendy & Affordable Fashion for Men, Women & Kids. Shop T-Shirts, Sportswear & More. Free Shipping Available. Wear With Attitude!" />
        <meta
            name="keywords"
            content="fashion, trendy clothing, affordable t-shirts, sportswear, online shopping, Cebu fashion" />
        <meta property="og:title" content="I&R EMPORIO | Premium Fashion Store" />
        <meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/images/logo-social-share.jpg" />
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com" />

        <title>I&R EMPORIO</title>
        <link
            href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@700;800;900&family=Permanent+Marker&family=Poppins:wght@400;600;700;800;900&display=swap"
            rel="stylesheet" />
        <style>
            /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
   PROMO TOP BANNER — Upgraded
══════════════════════════════════════════ */

@keyframes shimmerSweep {
    0%   { transform: translateX(-100%) skewX(-15deg); }
    100% { transform: translateX(400%) skewX(-15deg); }
}

@keyframes pulseGlow {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 80, 50, 0.55), 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); }
    50%       { box-shadow: 0 0 0 7px rgba(255, 80, 50, 0), 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); }
}

@keyframes marqueeScroll {
    0%   { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

@keyframes dotBlink {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50%       { opacity: 0.3; }
}

#flashing-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(
        100deg,
        #0b2110 0%,
        #1a4221 30%,
        #183d1f 60%,
        #2a1a00 85%,
        #3d2b00 100%
    );
    color: #fffaf0;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.35);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
    height: 46px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

#flashing-banner::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 60px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.13), transparent);
    animation: shimmerSweep 3.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 3;
}

#flashing-banner::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #dabd71 20%, #f5e49c 50%, #dabd71 80%, transparent 100%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

.banner-live {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 7px;
    padding: 0 16px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    z-index: 2;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
}

.banner-live-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #4ade80;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.9);
    animation: dotBlink 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.banner-live-label {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #f0e0a0;
}

.banner-marquee-wrap {
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #000 5%, #000 95%, transparent 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, #000 5%, #000 95%, transparent 100%);
}

.banner-marquee-track {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0;
    white-space: nowrap;
    animation: marqueeScroll 28s linear infinite;
    will-change: transform;
}

.banner-marquee-track:hover {
    animation-play-state: paused;
}

.bm-item {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 0 28px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    font-family: "Poppins", sans-serif;
}

.bm-item strong {
    color: #fff;
    font-weight: 800;
}

.bm-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.bm-pill-fire {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff4e1a, #ff7a3a);
    color: #fff;
    animation: pulseGlow 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 120, 60, 0.5);
}

.bm-pill-cod {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4a017, #f5d060);
    color: #1a2f0a;
    border: 1px solid rgba(218, 175, 50, 0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.3);
}

.bm-pill-ship {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e7a4e, #2ab56f);
    color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid rgba(40, 180, 100, 0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(30, 122, 78, 0.3);
}

.bm-pill-new {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #60a5fa);
    color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
}

.bm-pill-sale {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9333ea, #c084fc);
    color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.3);
}

.bm-dot-divider {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 4px;
    height: 4px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.7);
    margin: 0 4px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.banner-cta-wrap {
    padding: 0 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    z-index: 2;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
}

.banner-cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dabd71, #f5e49c);
    color: #1a3a10;
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(184, 139, 44, 0.4);
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.banner-cta-btn:hover {
    transform: scale(1.06);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(184, 139, 44, 0.55);
}

.banner-inner  { display: contents; }
.banner-copy   { display: none; }
.banner-badge  { display: none; }
.banner-separator { display: none; }

            .preview-overlay {
                position: fixed;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
                z-index: 1000;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
            }

            .preview-overlay img {
                max-width: 90%;
                max-height: 90%;
                border-radius: 10px;
                box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            }

            /* Dropdown Menu Styling */
            .dropdown {
                position: relative;
            }

            .dropdown-content {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                background-color: var(--header-bg);
                box-shadow: 0px 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                z-index: 1;
                top: 100%;
                left: 0;
                min-width: 160px;
                border-radius: 5px;
            }

            .dropdown-content li {
                padding: 10px;
            }

            .dropdown-content li a {
                color: var(--header-text);
                text-decoration: none;
                display: block;
                transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
            }

            .dropdown-content li a:hover {
                background-color: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
                border-radius: 5px;
            }

            .dropdown:hover .dropdown-content {
                display: block;
            }
            .lazy-load {
                background-color: #f0f0f0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 200px;
                border-radius: 10px;
                display: block;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
            }
            /* Modern cart icon styles */
            .cart-link {
                position: relative;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 10px;
                padding: 8px 14px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
                box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                overflow: visible;
            }

            .cart-link:hover {
                background: rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.2);
            }

            .cart-link.has-items {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.22), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1));
                color: #fff8df;
            }

            .cart-icon-wrap {
                width: 38px;
                height: 38px;
                border-radius: 14px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18), rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.28));
                box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
                position: relative;
                flex-shrink: 0;
            }

            .cart-icon-wrap::after {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                top: 6px;
                right: 7px;
                width: 8px;
                height: 8px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 255, 255, 1), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0));
                opacity: 0.9;
            }

            .cart-icon {
                width: 20px;
                height: 20px;
                stroke: currentColor;
                fill: none;
                stroke-width: 2;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .cart-label {
                font-size: 13px;
                font-weight: 700;
                letter-spacing: 0.08em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                color: inherit;
            }

            .cart-count {
                position: absolute;
                top: -6px;
                right: -6px;
                min-width: 24px;
                height: 24px;
                padding: 0 6px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #ff3b3b);
                color: white;
                font-size: 11px;
                font-weight: 800;
                line-height: 1;
                box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(255, 59, 59, 0.35);
                border: 2px solid rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.92);
            }

            .cart-count.is-empty {
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
                color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
                box-shadow: none;
            }

            /* Styling for "I&R EMPORIO" with Metallic Gold effect */
            header .logo h1 {
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
                letter-spacing: 1px;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                margin: 0;
                font-size: 24px;
                background: linear-gradient(45deg, #d2b059, rgba(239, 231, 119, 0.96)); /* Updated gradient */
                -webkit-background-clip: text;
                -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
                text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
                text-decoration: none;
            }

            /* Remove underline from logo link */
            header .logo a {
                text-decoration: none;
            }

            /* About Us Section */
            .about-container {
                max-width: 800px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                padding: 40px 20px;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .about-container h2 {
                font-size: 36px;
                color: #1a4221;
                margin-bottom: 20px;
            }

            .about-container .slogan {
                font-size: 24px;
                font-weight: bold;
                color: #dabd71;
                margin-bottom: 30px;
            }

            .about-container h3 {
                font-size: 28px;
                color: #1a4221;
                margin-top: 30px;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
            }

            .about-container p {
                font-size: 18px;
                line-height: 1.8;
                color: #555;
                margin-bottom: 20px;
            }

            .about-container ul {
                text-align: left;
                list-style-type: disc;
                padding-left: 40px;
                margin-bottom: 20px;
            }

            .about-container ul li {
                font-size: 16px;
                line-height: 1.8;
                color: #555;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            }

            .about-container .call-to-action {
                font-size: 20px;
                font-weight: bold;
                color: #1a4221;
                margin-top: 30px;
            }
            /* General Styling */
            body {
                font-family: "Roboto", sans-serif;
                margin: 0;
                padding: 0;
                background:
                    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.18), transparent 28%),
                    linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f4ec 0%, #eef3ed 45%, #e7efe7 100%);
                background-color: var(--bg-color);
                color: var(--text-color);
                transition:
                    background-color 0.3s ease,
                    color 0.3s ease;
                line-height: 1.6;
            }

            :root {
                --bg-color: #eef3ed;
                --surface-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
                --surface-strong: #ffffff;
                --text-color: #173622;
                --muted-text: #5f6f62;
                --header-bg: rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.94);
                --header-text: #f3df9d;
                --accent-color: #d8b45d;
                --accent-strong: #b88b2c;
                --border-color: rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.1);
                --shadow-soft: 0 18px 45px rgba(14, 28, 18, 0.1);
                --shadow-card: 0 16px 36px rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.12);
            }

            .dark-mode {
                --bg-color: #102215;
                --surface-color: rgba(18, 35, 24, 0.92);
                --surface-strong: #183121;
                --text-color: #eef5eb;
                --muted-text: #b7c8b9;
                --header-bg: rgba(7, 18, 10, 0.96);
                --header-text: #f5e5b1;
                --accent-color: #e1bc61;
                --accent-strong: #f0cf7f;
                --border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                --shadow-soft: 0 18px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
                --shadow-card: 0 16px 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
            }

            section {
                padding: 48px 20px 64px;
            }

            section h3 {
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
                font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 40px);
                letter-spacing: 0.02em;
                color: var(--text-color);
                text-align: center;
                margin: 0 0 12px;
            }

            section h3::after {
                content: "";
                display: block;
                width: 72px;
                height: 4px;
                margin: 14px auto 0;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-strong), var(--accent-color));
            }

            .section-intro {
                max-width: 620px;
                margin: 0 auto 28px;
                text-align: center;
                color: var(--muted-text);
                font-size: 16px;
            }

            /* Header */
            header {
                background: var(--header-bg);
                backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
                color: var(--header-text);
                padding: 14px 24px;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 18px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                position: sticky;
                top: 0;
                z-index: 20;
                border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                box-shadow: 0 18px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
            }

            header .logo h1 {
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
                letter-spacing: 1px;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                margin: 0;
                font-size: 24px;
            }

            header nav ul {
                list-style: none;
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 8px;
                margin: 0;
                padding: 0;
            }

            header nav ul li {
                margin-right: 0;
            }

            header nav ul li a {
                color: var(--header-text);
                font-weight: bold;
                padding: 10px 14px;
                text-decoration: none;
                display: block;
                transition:
                    color 0.3s ease,
                    background-color 0.3s ease,
                    transform 0.3s ease;
                border-radius: 999px;
            }

            header nav ul li a:hover {
                background-color: rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.14);
                color: #fff8df;
                transform: translateY(-1px);
            }

            .theme-toggle {
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
                color: var(--header-text);
                font-size: 20px;
                cursor: pointer;
                width: 46px;
                height: 46px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                transition:
                    transform 0.3s ease,
                    background-color 0.3s ease;
            }

            .theme-toggle:hover {
                transform: translateY(-2px);
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
            }

            /* Search Bar */
            #search-bar {
                padding: 12px 16px;
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
                border-radius: 999px;
                width: min(260px, 100%);
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
                color: #fff;
                outline: none;
            }

            #search-bar::placeholder {
                color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
            }

            /* Back to Top Button */
            .back-to-top {
                position: fixed;
                bottom: 20px;
                right: 20px;
                background-color: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 50%;
                font-size: 18px;
                width: 40px;
                height: 40px;
                cursor: pointer;
                display: none;
                box-shadow: 0 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            }

            .back-to-top:hover {
                background-color: #f2e2a2;
            }

            /* Main Banner */
            .main-banner {
                background-image: url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1483985988355-763728e1935b?ixlib=rb-1.2.1&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&h=800&q=80");
                background-size: cover;
                background-position: top center;
                background-repeat: no-repeat;
                width: 100%;
                min-height: 78vh;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
                text-align: center;
                color: var(--header-text);
                box-shadow: inset 0 0 120px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
                position: relative;
                overflow: hidden;
                padding: 32px 20px;
            }

            .main-banner::before {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                inset: 0;
                background:
                    linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(8, 20, 10, 0.78), rgba(8, 20, 10, 0.25)),
                    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(216, 180, 93, 0.25), transparent 32%);
            }

            .banner-content {
                position: relative;
                max-width: 720px;
                padding: 36px;
                border-radius: 28px;
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
                backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
                box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
            }

            .banner-kicker {
                display: inline-block;
                padding: 8px 14px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                margin-bottom: 18px;
                background: rgba(216, 180, 93, 0.18);
                color: #fff2c4;
                font-size: 13px;
                letter-spacing: 0.12em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-weight: 700;
            }

            .banner-content h2 {
                font-size: clamp(38px, 7vw, 72px);
                line-height: 1.05;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
            }

            .banner-content p {
                font-size: 18px;
                color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86);
                margin: 0 auto 28px;
                max-width: 560px;
            }

            .hero-metrics {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
                gap: 14px;
                margin-top: 28px;
            }

            .hero-metric {
                padding: 16px;
                border-radius: 18px;
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            }

            .hero-metric strong {
                display: block;
                font-size: 22px;
                color: #fff;
            }

            .hero-metric span {
                font-size: 13px;
                color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
            }

            .btn-shop-now {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-color), #f2dc95);
                color: #173622;
                padding: 14px 28px;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-weight: bold;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 999px;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition: all 0.3s ease;
                box-shadow: 0 14px 24px rgba(184, 139, 44, 0.22);
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            }

            .btn-shop-now:hover {
                transform: scale(1.05);
                box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            }

            /* Fix Shop Now button underline issue */
            .btn-shop-now {
                text-decoration: none;
            }

            /* Product Section */
            .products {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
                gap: 24px;
                padding: 28px 20px 0;
                max-width: 1200px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .product {
                background-color: var(--surface-color);
                border: 1px solid rgba(216, 180, 93, 0.28);
                border-radius: 24px;
                box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
                transition:
                    transform 0.3s,
                    box-shadow 0.3s;
                text-align: center;
                padding: 20px;
                animation: slideIn 0.5s ease-out;
                backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            }

            .product:hover {
                transform: translateY(-10px);
                box-shadow: 0 20px 32px rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.18);
            }

            .product img {
                max-width: 100%; /* Prevents excessive stretching */
                height: auto; /* Keeps aspect ratio */
                object-fit: contain; /* Prevents unwanted zooming */
                border-radius: 18px;
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75);
            }

            .product h3 {
                font-size: 18px;
                margin: 10px 0;
            }

            .product p {
                font-size: 16px;
                color: #555;
                margin: 10px 0;
            }

            .product button {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-color), #efdaa1);
                color: #173622;
                padding: 12px 16px;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 999px;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-weight: bold;
                transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
                width: 100%;
            }

            .product button:hover {
                background: #173622;
                color: #f1dd9f;
            }

            @keyframes fadeIn {
                from {
                    opacity: 0;
                    transform: translateY(20px);
                }
                to {
                    opacity: 1;
                    transform: translateY(0);
                }
            }

            @keyframes slideIn {
                from {
                    transform: translateX(-100%);
                }
                to {
                    transform: translateX(0);
                }
            }
            .product-image-container {
                position: relative;
            }

            .auto-slideshow-indicator {
                position: absolute;
                top: 10px;
                right: 10px;
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
                color: white;
                padding: 5px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                font-size: 12px;
                cursor: pointer;
            }
            /* Product Details Popup Styling */
            .product-details {
                display: none; /* Hidden by default */
                position: fixed;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
                width: 90%; /* Adjust width for smaller screens */
                max-width: 400px; /* Reduce max-width for a smaller popup */
                background-color: #fff;
                padding: 20px; /* Reduce padding for a more compact look */
                border-radius: 15px;
                box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                z-index: 1000; /* Ensure it's above other elements */
                animation: popIn 0.3s ease-out;
                border: 1px solid #dabd71;
            }

            .product-details.active {
                display: block; /* Show the popup when active */
            }
            .thumbnail-container {
                text-align: center;
                margin: 15px 0;
            }

            #thumbnail-image {
                max-width: 100%;
                max-height: 200px;
                border-radius: 10px;
                box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            }
            .product-details h4 {
                font-size: 20px; /* Slightly smaller font size */
                color: #1a4221;
                margin-bottom: 15px; /* Reduce margin */
                text-align: center;
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
            }

            .product-details .detail-group {
                margin: 15px 0; /* Reduce margin */
                text-align: center;
            }

            .product-details .detail-group label {
                font-size: 16px; /* Slightly smaller font size */
                color: #1a4221;
                font-weight: bold;
                display: block;
                margin-bottom: 8px; /* Reduce margin */
            }

            .product-details .size-options {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 8px; /* Reduce gap between size options */
                margin-top: 8px; /* Reduce margin */
            }

            .product-details .size-option {
                padding: 8px 12px; /* Reduce padding */
                border: 2px solid #dabd71;
                border-radius: 5px;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-size: 14px; /* Slightly smaller font size */
                color: #1a4221;
                transition: all 0.3s ease;
            }

            .product-details .size-option.selected {
                background-color: #1a4221;
                color: #fff;
                border-color: #1a4221;
            }

            .product-details .size-option:hover {
                background-color: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
            }

            .product-details .color-options {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 8px; /* Reduce gap between color options */
                margin-top: 8px; /* Reduce margin */
            }

            /* Color options inside the product details popup */
            .product-details .color-option {
                width: 25px; /* Larger size for better visibility in popup */
                height: 25px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                cursor: pointer;
                border: 2px solid #ccc;
                transition: all 0.3s ease; /* Smooth hover effect */
            }

            .product-details .color-option:hover {
                border-color: #1a4221; /* Highlight on hover */
                transform: scale(1.1); /* Slightly enlarge on hover */
            }

            .product-details .color-option.selected {
                border-color: #1a4221; /* Highlight selected color */
                transform: scale(1.1); /* Slightly enlarge selected color */
            }

            .product-details p {
                font-size: 14px; /* Slightly smaller font size */
                color: #555;
                margin: 8px 0; /* Reduce margin */
                text-align: center;
            }

            .product-details button {
                background-color: #1a4221;
                color: #fff;
                padding: 10px 20px; /* Reduce padding */
                border: none;
                border-radius: 5px;
                font-size: 14px; /* Slightly smaller font size */
                font-weight: bold;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition: all 0.3s ease;
                display: block;
                margin: 15px auto 0; /* Reduce margin */
            }

            .product-details button:hover {
                background-color: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
                transform: translateY(-3px);
            }

            /* Animation for popup */
            @keyframes popIn {
                from {
                    opacity: 0;
                    transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9);
                }
                to {
                    opacity: 1;
                    transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
                }
            }
            .home-highlights {
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: -36px auto 0;
                padding: 0 20px 12px;
                position: relative;
                z-index: 2;
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
                gap: 18px;
            }

            .highlight-card {
                background: var(--surface-color);
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                border-radius: 22px;
                padding: 22px;
                box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
                backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            }

            .highlight-card strong {
                display: block;
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-size: 18px;
                margin-bottom: 8px;
            }

            .highlight-card p {
                margin: 0;
                color: var(--muted-text);
            }

            /* Footer */
            footer {
                background:
                    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.94), rgba(9, 23, 12, 1)),
                    var(--header-bg);
                color: #f4edd8;
                padding: 56px 20px 28px;
                margin-top: 28px;
            }

            .footer-grid {
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 28px;
            }

            .footer-brand h3,
            .footer-column h4 {
                margin-top: 0;
                margin-bottom: 14px;
                color: #fff5cc;
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
            }

            .footer-brand h3 {
                font-size: 28px;
            }

            .footer-brand p,
            .footer-column p {
                color: rgba(244, 237, 216, 0.78);
                margin: 0 0 12px;
            }

            .footer-column ul {
                list-style: none;
                padding: 0;
                margin: 0;
            }

            .footer-column li {
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            }

            .footer-column a,
            .social-sharing a,
            .footer-contact a {
                color: #f3df9d;
                text-decoration: none;
                transition:
                    color 0.3s ease,
                    opacity 0.3s ease;
            }

            .footer-column a:hover,
            .social-sharing a:hover,
            .footer-contact a:hover {
                color: #ffffff;
            }

            .social-sharing {
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 10px;
                margin-top: 18px;
            }

            .social-sharing a {
                padding: 10px 14px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            }

            .footer-cta {
                display: inline-block;
                margin-top: 8px;
                padding: 12px 18px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-color), #f2dc95);
                color: #173622;
                font-weight: 700;
                text-decoration: none;
            }

            .footer-bottom {
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: 34px auto 0;
                padding-top: 18px;
                border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                gap: 12px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                color: rgba(244, 237, 216, 0.68);
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            /* Responsive Design */
            @media (max-width: 768px) {
                #flashing-banner {
                    padding: 12px 14px;
                }

                .banner-inner {
                    gap: 10px;
                }

                .banner-badge {
                    font-size: 11px;
                    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
                }

                .banner-copy {
                    font-size: 13px;
                }

                header {
                    justify-content: center;
                    padding: 14px 16px 18px;
                }
                header nav {
                    width: 100%;
                }

                header nav ul {
                    flex-direction: row;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: center;
                }

                #search-bar {
                    width: 100%;
                    max-width: 520px;
                }

                .btn-shop-now {
                    font-size: 12px;
                    padding: 12px 18px;
                }

                .main-banner {
                    min-height: 560px;
                }

                .products {
                    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
                }

                .banner-content {
                    padding: 26px 20px;
                }

                .hero-metrics,
                .home-highlights,
                .footer-grid {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                }
                .home-highlights {
                    margin-top: 20px;
                }

                .footer-bottom {
                    flex-direction: column;
                    text-align: center;
                }
            }

                .cart-link {
                    padding: 8px 12px;
                }

                .cart-label {
                    display: none;
                }

                .cart-heading {
                    align-items: stretch;
                }

                .cart-action-row {
                    width: 100%;
                }

                .cart-action-row .cart-secondary-btn {
                    flex: 1;
                }

                .cart-layout {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                }

                .cart-summary-card {
                    position: static;
                }

                .cart-item {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                }

                .cart-item-top {
                    grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
                }

                .cart-item-actions {
                    align-items: flex-start;
                }

                        /* Hidden sections */
            .hidden {
                display: none;
            }

            /* Google Map */
            .map-container {
                width: 100%;
                height: 400px;
                margin-top: 20px;
                border-radius: 10px;
                overflow: hidden;
                box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            }

            /* Chat Button */
            .chat-button {
                position: fixed;
                bottom: 20px;
                right: 20px;
                background-color: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 50%;
                font-size: 24px;
                width: 60px;
                height: 60px;
                cursor: pointer;
                box-shadow: 0 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                transition:
                    transform 0.3s ease,
                    background-color 0.3s ease;
            }

            .chat-button:hover {
                background-color: #f2e2a2;
                transform: scale(1.1);
            }

            .chat-button::after {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                top: -5px;
                right: -5px;
                width: 20px;
                height: 20px;
                background-color: #ff4d4d;
                border-radius: 50%;
                border: 2px solid #fff;
            }

            /* Account Section */
            .account-section {
                padding: 20px;
                max-width: 400px;
                margin: 50px auto;
                text-align: center;
            }

            /* Align tabs in a row */
            .account-tabs {
                list-style: none;
                padding: 0;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center; /* Ensures buttons stay centered */
                gap: 10px; /* Adds equal spacing */
                margin-bottom: 20px;
            }

            /* Make all buttons equal in width */
            .account-tabs li {
                flex: 1; /* Ensures equal width */
                display: flex;
            }

            /* Style for each tab */
            .account-tabs li a {
                text-decoration: none;
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-weight: bold;
                padding: 10px;
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
                background: #dabd71; /* Gold background */
                border-radius: 5px;
                transition:
                    background-color 0.3s ease,
                    transform 0.2s ease;
                flex-grow: 1; /* Makes buttons take equal space */
                white-space: nowrap; /* Prevents Membership Card from breaking */
            }

            /* Hover effect */
            .account-tabs li a:hover {
                background-color: #1a4221; /* Dark green on hover */
                color: #dabd71; /* Gold text on hover */
                transform: scale(1.05);
            }

            /* Sign In & Sign Up Form Styling */
            .account-form {
                background-color: #fff;
                padding: 25px;
                border-radius: 10px;
                box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                text-align: center;
                animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-in-out;
            }

            .account-form h3 {
                color: #1a4221;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
                font-size: 22px;
            }

            /* Input Fields */
            .form-group {
                margin-bottom: 15px;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .form-group label {
                display: block;
                margin-bottom: 5px;
                color: #555;
                font-weight: bold;
            }

            .form-group input {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 10px;
                border: 1px solid #ccc;
                border-radius: 5px;
                font-size: 16px;
                transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
            }

            .form-group input:focus {
                border-color: #dabd71;
                outline: none;
            }

            /* Buttons */
            .btn-submit {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 12px;
                background: linear-gradient(45deg, #dabd71, #f2e2a2);
                color: #1a4221;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 5px;
                font-size: 16px;
                font-weight: bold;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition: all 0.3s ease;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            }

            .btn-submit:hover {
                background: #1a4221;
                color: #dabd71;
                transform: translateY(-3px);
            }

            /* Switch Between Sign In & Sign Up */
            .account-switch {
                text-align: center;
                margin-top: 15px;
                color: #555;
            }

            .account-switch a {
                color: #1a4221;
                text-decoration: none;
                font-weight: bold;
            }

            .account-switch a:hover {
                text-decoration: underline;
            }

            /* Fade-in Animation */
            @keyframes fadeIn {
                from {
                    opacity: 0;
                    transform: translateY(-10px);
                }
                to {
                    opacity: 1;
                    transform: translateY(0);
                }
            }

            /* Loyalty Program Section */
            .loyalty-container {
                max-width: 1200px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                padding: 20px;
            }

            .loyalty-card {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dabd71, #f2e2a2);
                border-radius: 15px;
                padding: 30px;
                box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
                margin-bottom: 40px;
            }

            .points-display {
                text-align: center;
                color: #1a4221;
            }

            .points-value {
                font-size: 48px;
                font-weight: bold;
                margin: 20px 0;
            }

            .progress-bar {
                background: rgba(26, 66, 33, 0.1);
                height: 20px;
                border-radius: 10px;
                overflow: hidden;
            }

            .progress {
                background: #1a4221;
                height: 100%;
                transition: width 0.5s ease;
            }

            .rewards-grid {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
                gap: 20px;
            }

            .reward-card {
                background: white;
                padding: 25px;
                border-radius: 15px;
                text-align: center;
                box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }

            .reward-card:hover {
                transform: translateY(-5px);
            }

            .reward-icon {
                font-size: 40px;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
            }

            .redeem-btn {
                background: #1a4221;
                color: white;
                border: none;
                padding: 10px 20px;
                border-radius: 25px;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition: all 0.3s ease;
            }

            .redeem-btn:hover {
                background: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
            }
            /* Lazy load images */
            img {
                loading: lazy;
            }

            /* Cart Dropdown */
            .cart-dropdown {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                background: white;
                box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                padding: 10px;
                border-radius: 5px;
                right: 0;
                top: 30px;
            }

            .cart-link:hover .cart-dropdown {
                display: block;
            }
            /* Lightbox Styles */
            .lightbox {
                position: fixed;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                align-items: center;
                z-index: 1000;
            }

            .lightbox img {
                max-width: 90%;
                max-height: 90%;
            }

            .lightbox.hidden {
                display: none;
            }

            .lightbox-nav {
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                transform: translateY(-50%);
                color: white;
                background: none;
                border: none;
                font-size: 30px;
                cursor: pointer;
            }

            .lightbox-nav.prev {
                left: 20px;
            }

            .lightbox-nav.next {
                right: 20px;
            }

            .close-lightbox {
                position: absolute;
                top: 20px;
                right: 20px;
                font-size: 40px;
                color: white;
                cursor: pointer;
            }

            .lightbox-caption {
                position: absolute;
                bottom: 10px;
                left: 10px;
                color: white;
                font-size: 16px;
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
                padding: 5px 10px;
                border-radius: 5px;
            }

            .fullscreen-btn {
                position: absolute;
                top: 10px;
                left: 20px;
                color: white;
                background: none;
                border: none;
                font-size: 20px;
                cursor: pointer;
            }
            /* Spinner Styles */
            .spinner {
                border: 8px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
                border-top: 8px solid #fff;
                border-radius: 50%;
                width: 60px;
                height: 60px;
                animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
                z-index: 1001;
            }

            @keyframes spin {
                0% {
                    transform: rotate(0deg);
                }
                100% {
                    transform: rotate(360deg);
                }
            }

            .spinner.hidden {
                display: none;
            }
            /* Lightbox Thumbnails Styles */
            .lightbox-thumbnails {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                margin-top: 10px;
            }

            .lightbox-thumbnails img {
                width: 60px;
                height: 60px;
                margin: 0 5px;
                cursor: pointer;
                opacity: 0.6;
                transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            }

            .lightbox-thumbnails img.active {
                border: 2px solid #fff;
                opacity: 1;
            }

            .lightbox-thumbnails img:hover {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            /* Share and Download Buttons Styles */
            .download-btn,
            .share-btn {
                position: absolute;
                bottom: 20px;
                background: #dabd71;
                color: #1a4221;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 5px;
                padding: 10px 20px;
                font-size: 16px;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition: background 0.3s;
            }

            .download-btn {
                left: 20px;
            }

            .share-btn {
                right: 20px;
            }

            .download-btn:hover,
            .share-btn:hover {
                background: #f2e2a2;
            }

            /* Updated CSS to prevent unwanted zooming */
            .preview-container img {
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensures image fits within container */
                height: auto;
                transform: none !important; /* Prevents unwanted scaling */
                zoom: 1 !important; /* Ensures no forced zoom */
            }
            /* Ensure consistent thumbnail size for product containers in search results */
            #search-results .product {
                max-width: 250px; /* Adjust as needed for your thumbnail size */
                margin: auto; /* Center the product containers */
            }

            #search-results .product img {
                max-width: 100%;
                height: auto;
            }
            #no-results-message {
                text-align: center;
                margin-top: 20px;
                font-size: 18px;
                color: #555;
            }

            #no-results-message.hidden {
                display: none;
            }
            .zoom-container img {
                transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
                cursor: zoom-in;
            }
            .zoom-container.zoomed img {
                transform: scale(2);
                cursor: zoom-out;
            }
            .color-options {
                display: flex;
                gap: 5px;
                margin: 10px 0;
                justify-content: center; /* Center the color options horizontally */
            }
            /* Global color options (used in product listings) */
            .color-option {
                width: 20px;
                height: 20px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                cursor: pointer;
                border: 2px solid #ccc;
            }

            .color-option:hover {
                border-color: #000;
            }
            .detail-group {
                margin: 15px 0;
            }

            .size-options {
                display: flex;
                gap: 10px;
                margin: 10px 0;
            }

            .size-option {
                padding: 8px 12px;
                border: 1px solid #ccc;
                border-radius: 5px;
                cursor: pointer;
            }

            .size-option.selected {
                background-color: #1a4221;
                color: white;
            }
            .cart-popup {
                position: fixed;
                top: 24px;
                right: 24px;
                min-width: 260px;
                max-width: min(90vw, 360px);
                background: rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.96);
                color: #fff9e8;
                padding: 14px 16px;
                border-radius: 18px;
                box-shadow: 0 24px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.26);
                border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                z-index: 1001;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 12px;
                opacity: 0;
                pointer-events: none;
                transform: translateY(-12px);
                transition:
                    opacity 0.25s ease,
                    transform 0.25s ease;
                backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
            }

            .cart-popup::before {
                content: "✓";
                width: 34px;
                height: 34px;
                border-radius: 12px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-color), #f2dc95);
                color: #173622;
                font-weight: 800;
                flex-shrink: 0;
            }

            .cart-popup.show {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
                pointer-events: auto;
            }

            #cart {
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            #cart h3 {
                text-align: left;
            }

            #cart h3::after {
                margin: 14px 0 0;
            }

            #cart .section-intro {
                margin: 0;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .cart-shell {
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .cart-heading {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                align-items: flex-start;
                gap: 18px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                margin-bottom: 28px;
            }

            .cart-kicker {
                margin: 0 0 8px;
                color: var(--accent-strong);
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: 800;
                letter-spacing: 0.12em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            .cart-action-row {
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 12px;
            }

            .cart-secondary-btn,
            .cart-cta {
                border: none;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-weight: 700;
                transition:
                    transform 0.25s ease,
                    box-shadow 0.25s ease,
                    background-color 0.25s ease,
                    color 0.25s ease;
            }

            .cart-secondary-btn {
                padding: 12px 18px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.06);
                color: var(--text-color);
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            }

            .cart-secondary-btn:hover {
                transform: translateY(-2px);
                background: rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.18);
            }

            .cart-layout {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.6fr) minmax(300px, 0.9fr);
                gap: 24px;
                align-items: start;
            }

            .cart-panel,
            .cart-summary-card {
                background: var(--surface-color);
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                border-radius: 28px;
                padding: 24px;
                box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
                backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            }

            .cart-panel-header {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 12px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                margin-bottom: 18px;
            }

            .cart-panel-header h4,
            .cart-summary-card h4 {
                margin: 0;
                font-size: 22px;
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
            }

            .cart-panel-subtext,
            .cart-summary-card p,
            .cart-note,
            .cart-summary-eyebrow {
                color: var(--muted-text);
            }

            .cart-panel-subtext {
                margin: 4px 0 0;
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            .cart-items-list {
                display: grid;
                gap: 16px;
            }

            .cart-item {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
                gap: 18px;
                padding: 18px;
                border-radius: 24px;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.54);
            }

            .dark-mode .cart-item,
            .dark-mode .cart-empty-state {
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
            }

            .cart-item-main {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 14px;
            }

            .cart-item-top {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 88px 1fr;
                gap: 16px;
                align-items: start;
            }

            .cart-thumb {
                width: 88px;
                height: 88px;
                border-radius: 22px;
                overflow: hidden;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.18), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65));
                border: 1px solid rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.24);
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .cart-thumb img {
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                object-fit: cover;
            }

            .cart-thumb-placeholder svg {
                width: 30px;
                height: 30px;
                opacity: 0.72;
                stroke: var(--text-color);
                fill: none;
                stroke-width: 1.8;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .cart-item-title-row {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                gap: 14px;
                align-items: flex-start;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }

            .cart-item h4 {
                margin: 0 0 6px;
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-size: 18px;
                text-align: left;
            }

            .cart-item h4::after {
                display: none;
            }

            .cart-line-price {
                margin: 0;
                color: var(--muted-text);
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            .cart-item-subtotal {
                font-size: 18px;
                font-weight: 800;
                color: var(--text-color);
                white-space: nowrap;
            }

            .cart-meta {
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 10px;
                margin-top: 10px;
            }

            .cart-chip {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 8px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.06);
                border: 1px solid rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.08);
                color: var(--muted-text);
                font-size: 13px;
                line-height: 1;
            }

            .color-swatch {
                width: 12px;
                height: 12px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                border: 1px solid rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.18);
                flex-shrink: 0;
            }

            .cart-item-actions {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 14px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }

            .quantity-controls {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 8px;
                padding: 6px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                background: rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.06);
            }

            .quantity-controls button {
                width: 34px;
                height: 34px;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 50%;
                cursor: pointer;
                background: var(--surface-strong);
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-size: 18px;
                font-weight: 700;
                box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(15, 41, 19, 0.08);
            }

            .quantity-controls button:hover {
                transform: translateY(-1px);
                background: var(--accent-color);
                color: #173622;
            }

            .quantity-value {
                min-width: 24px;
                text-align: center;
                font-weight: 800;
                color: var(--text-color);
            }

            .cart-remove-btn {
                border: none;
                background: transparent;
                color: #b54c4c;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-weight: 700;
                padding: 0;
            }

            .cart-remove-btn:hover {
                color: #8f2424;
            }

            .cart-summary-card {
                position: sticky;
                top: 96px;
            }

            .cart-summary-eyebrow {
                display: inline-block;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: 800;
                letter-spacing: 0.12em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                color: var(--accent-strong);
            }

            .cart-summary-card > p {
                margin: 8px 0 0;
                font-size: 14px;
            }

            .cart-progress {
                margin: 18px 0 20px;
            }

            .cart-progress-text {
                margin: 0 0 10px;
                font-size: 13px;
                line-height: 1.5;
                color: var(--muted-text);
            }

            .cart-progress-bar {
                width: 100%;
                height: 10px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                overflow: hidden;
                background: rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.08);
            }

            .cart-progress-fill {
                height: 100%;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-strong), var(--accent-color));
            }

            .cart-summary-line {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 14px;
                margin-bottom: 14px;
                color: var(--text-color);
            }

            .cart-summary-total {
                margin-top: 16px;
                padding-top: 16px;
                border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                font-size: 20px;
                font-weight: 800;
            }

            .cart-cta {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 14px 18px;
                margin-top: 14px;
                border-radius: 18px;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-color), #f2dc95);
                color: #173622;
                box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(184, 139, 44, 0.22);
            }

            .cart-cta:hover {
                transform: translateY(-2px);
                box-shadow: 0 20px 30px rgba(184, 139, 44, 0.26);
            }

            .cart-note {
                margin: 14px 0 0;
                font-size: 13px;
                line-height: 1.5;
            }

            .cart-empty-state {
                padding: 54px 26px;
                border-radius: 28px;
                border: 1px dashed rgba(23, 54, 34, 0.18);
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);
                text-align: center;
                box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
            }

            .cart-empty-icon {
                width: 74px;
                height: 74px;
                margin: 0 auto 18px;
                border-radius: 24px;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.18), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7));
                border: 1px solid rgba(218, 189, 113, 0.24);
            }

            .cart-empty-icon svg {
                width: 34px;
                height: 34px;
                stroke: var(--text-color);
                fill: none;
                stroke-width: 1.8;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .cart-empty-state h4 {
                margin: 0 0 8px;
                font-size: 24px;
                color: var(--text-color);
                font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
            }

            .cart-empty-state p {
                margin: 0 auto;
                max-width: 520px;
                color: var(--muted-text);
            }

            .cart-empty-actions {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 12px;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                margin-top: 20px;
            }

            .cart-cta-inline {
                width: auto;
                min-width: 190px;
            }

            #membership-card-container {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dabd71, #f2e2a2);
                border-radius: 15px;
                padding: 20px;
                text-align: center;
                color: #1a4221;
                box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
                max-width: 300px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            #membership-card-content h4 {
                font-size: 24px;
                margin-bottom: 10px;
            }

            #membership-card-content p {
                font-size: 16px;
                margin: 5px 0;
            }
            /* Membership Card Button */
            #membership-card button {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 10px;
                background: #dabd71; /* Gold background */
                color: #1a4221; /* Dark green text */
                border: none;
                border-radius: 5px;
                font-size: 16px;
                font-weight: bold;
                cursor: pointer;
                transition:
                    background-color 0.3s ease,
                    transform 0.2s ease;
                margin-top: 0px;
            }

            #membership-card button:hover {
                background-color: #1a4221; /* Dark green on hover */
                color: #dabd71; /* Gold text on hover */
                transform: scale(1.05);
            }
            
        /* Add to existing account-tabs li a styles */
.account-tabs li a[onclick="signOut()"] {
    background: #1a4221;
    color: #dabd71;
}

.account-tabs li a[onclick="signOut()"]:hover {
    background: #dabd71;
    color: #1a4221;
}

            /* Reference-style storefront refresh */
            :root {
                --sample-black: #030708;
                --sample-ink: #070b0c;
                --sample-panel: #101719;
                --sample-gold: #f4bf3f;
                --sample-gold-deep: #be851c;
                --sample-cream: #fff8df;
                --sample-muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.74);
            }

            * {
                box-sizing: border-box;
            }

            body {
                font-family: "Poppins", "Roboto", sans-serif;
                background: #f4f4f4;
                color: #15191c;
            }

            body.dark-mode {
                background: #f4f4f4;
                color: #15191c;
            }

            #flashing-banner.top-deal-strip {
                padding: 0 22px;
                min-height: 40px;
                background: #00331f;
                color: #ffffff;
                border: 0;
                box-shadow: none;
            }

            #flashing-banner.top-deal-strip::before {
                display: none;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-inner {
                min-height: 40px;
                max-width: 1160px;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 22px;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-badge {
                gap: 6px;
                padding: 5px 12px;
                border-radius: 5px;
                border: 0;
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd862, var(--sample-gold));
                color: #151407;
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 1;
                letter-spacing: 0;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-badge svg {
                width: 14px;
                height: 14px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 2;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-copy {
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: 500;
                line-height: 1;
                margin: 0;
                letter-spacing: 0;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-copy strong {
                font-weight: 900;
                color: #ffffff;
            }

            .top-deal-strip .banner-separator {
                width: 1px;
                height: 18px;
                background: var(--sample-gold);
                opacity: 0.9;
            }

            header.site-header {
                position: sticky;
                top: 0;
                z-index: 50;
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 190px 1fr auto;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 28px;
                min-height: 126px;
                padding: 18px 58px 22px;
                background: var(--sample-black);
                color: #ffffff;
                border: 0;
                box-shadow: none;
                backdrop-filter: none;
            }

            .site-header .logo a {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                width: 132px;
                text-decoration: none;
            }

            .site-header .brand-logo-img {
                display: block;
                width: 132px;
                height: auto;
                object-fit: contain;
                filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 9px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.22));
            }

            .site-header .logo h1 {
                display: grid;
                gap: 4px;
                margin: 0;
                line-height: 1;
                text-transform: none;
                text-shadow: none;
                background: none;
                -webkit-text-fill-color: initial;
                font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
            }

            .site-header .logo h1 span {
                display: block;
                font-size: clamp(46px, 5vw, 72px);
                font-weight: 400;
                letter-spacing: -0.05em;
                background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffde76 0%, #efb935 46%, #9f6615 100%);
                -webkit-background-clip: text;
                -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
                filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 5px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.25));
            }

            .site-header .logo h1 em {
                display: block;
                font-family: "Poppins", sans-serif;
                color: var(--sample-gold);
                font-size: 16px;
                font-style: normal;
                font-weight: 500;
                letter-spacing: 0.48em;
                text-indent: 0.15em;
            }

            .primary-nav ul {
                justify-content: center;
                gap: clamp(18px, 2.8vw, 44px);
                flex-wrap: nowrap;
            }

            .primary-nav ul li a {
                position: relative;
                padding: 12px 0 16px;
                border-radius: 0;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 900;
                letter-spacing: -0.01em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                background: transparent;
            }

            .primary-nav ul li a:hover {
                color: var(--sample-gold);
                background: transparent;
                transform: none;
            }

            .primary-nav ul li a.active {
                color: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            .primary-nav ul li a.active::after {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                bottom: 0;
                height: 2px;
                background: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            .nav-caret {
                display: inline-block;
                margin-left: 4px;
                color: currentColor;
                font-size: 14px;
                transform: translateY(-1px);
            }

            .site-header .dropdown-content {
                top: calc(100% - 8px);
                min-width: 190px;
                padding: 10px;
                border-radius: 12px;
                background: #0b1111;
                border: 1px solid rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.22);
                box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            }

            .site-header .dropdown-content li {
                padding: 0;
            }

            .site-header .dropdown-content li a {
                display: block;
                padding: 10px 12px;
                font-size: 12px;
            }

            .header-actions {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 20px;
            }

            .nav-search,
            .account-icon-link {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                color: #ffffff;
                text-decoration: none;
            }
