            .nav-search {
                position: relative;
                gap: 10px;
                min-width: 36px;
                height: 42px;
                cursor: text;
            }

            .nav-search svg,
            .account-icon-link svg {
                width: 34px;
                height: 34px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 2.2;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
                flex: 0 0 auto;
            }

            .nav-search #search-bar {
                width: 0 !important;
                min-width: 0;
                max-width: 180px;
                opacity: 0;
                pointer-events: none;
                padding: 0;
                border: 0;
                background: transparent;
                color: #ffffff;
                transition: width 0.24s ease, opacity 0.24s ease, padding 0.24s ease;
            }

            .nav-search:hover #search-bar,
            .nav-search #search-bar:focus {
                width: 150px !important;
                opacity: 1;
                pointer-events: auto;
                padding: 10px 12px;
                border: 1px solid rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.32);
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
                outline: 0;
            }

            .bag-button.cart-link {
                width: 78px;
                height: 78px;
                padding: 0;
                justify-content: center;
                border-radius: 14px;
                border: 1px solid rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.75);
                background: rgba(7, 9, 9, 0.92);
                color: var(--sample-gold);
                box-shadow:
                    0 0 0 1px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.18),
                    0 0 28px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.45),
                    inset 0 0 20px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.08);
            }

            .bag-button .cart-icon-wrap {
                width: 44px;
                height: 44px;
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
                box-shadow: none;
            }

            .bag-button .cart-icon-wrap::after {
                display: none;
            }

            .bag-button .cart-icon {
                width: 40px;
                height: 40px;
                stroke-width: 1.8;
            }

            .bag-button .cart-count {
                top: -17px;
                right: -18px;
                min-width: 22px;
                height: 22px;
                border: 0;
                background: #1c2428;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 12px;
                box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
            }

            .bag-button .cart-label,
            .utility-hidden {
                position: absolute;
                width: 1px;
                height: 1px;
                overflow: hidden;
                clip: rect(0 0 0 0);
                white-space: nowrap;
            }

            #home {
                padding: 0;
                background: var(--sample-black);
            }

            #home.main-is-hidden {
                display: none;
            }

            #home .main-banner {
                width: auto;
                min-height: clamp(570px, 64vw, 745px);
                margin: 0 18px;
                padding: clamp(38px, 6vw, 74px);
                justify-content: flex-start;
                align-items: center;
                text-align: left;
                color: #ffffff;
                background: #020707;
                border-radius: 28px;
                box-shadow: none;
                isolation: isolate;
            }

            #home .hero-carousel {
                position: absolute;
                inset: 0;
                z-index: 0;
                overflow: hidden;
                border-radius: inherit;
            }

            #home .hero-slide {
                position: absolute;
                inset: 0;
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(-8%);
                transition:
                    opacity 900ms ease,
                    transform 1100ms cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.78, 0.25, 1);
                will-change: opacity, transform;
            }

            #home .hero-slide.is-active {
                z-index: 1;
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateX(0);
            }

            #home .hero-slide.is-leaving {
                z-index: 0;
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateX(8%);
            }

            #home .hero-slide .hero-photo {
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                right: 3.5%;
                width: min(62%, 860px);
                height: 88%;
                object-fit: contain;
                object-position: 78% center;
                background:
                    radial-gradient(circle at 72% 45%, rgba(244, 191, 63, 0.1), transparent 30%),
                    linear-gradient(90deg, #020707 0%, #07100e 48%, #020707 100%);
                filter: saturate(1.04) contrast(1.03) brightness(1.06);
                transform: translateY(-50%);
            }

            #home .hero-slide-main .hero-photo {
                object-fit: contain;
                object-position: left center;
                width: min(66%, 930px);
                height: 90%;
                transform: translateY(-50%) scaleX(-1);
                background:
                    radial-gradient(circle at 72% 45%, rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.1), transparent 30%),
                    linear-gradient(90deg, #020707 0%, #07110e 45%, #020707 100%);
            }

            #home .hero-slide-store .hero-photo {
                object-position: 78% center;
            }

            #home .hero-slide-products .hero-photo {
                object-position: 78% center;
            }

            #home .main-banner.hero-is-animating .banner-content {
                animation: heroCopyRefresh 650ms ease;
            }

            @keyframes heroCopyRefresh {
                from {
                    opacity: 0.35;
                    transform: translateX(-18px);
                }
                to {
                    opacity: 1;
                    transform: translateX(0);
                }
            }

            #home .main-banner::before {
                z-index: 1;
                background:
                    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 7, 5, 0.97) 0%, rgba(0, 7, 5, 0.92) 34%, rgba(0, 7, 5, 0.46) 57%, rgba(0, 7, 5, 0.06) 100%),
                    radial-gradient(circle at 27% 48%, rgba(0, 49, 31, 0.7), transparent 37%),
                    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2));
            }

            #home .main-banner::after {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                z-index: 1;
                top: -18%;
                left: 44%;
                width: 420px;
                height: 980px;
                border-left: 4px solid rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.78);
                border-radius: 50%;
                box-shadow:
                    -10px 0 30px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.42),
                    inset 28px 0 50px rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.12);
                transform: rotate(7deg);
                pointer-events: none;
            }

            #home .banner-content {
                position: relative;
                z-index: 2;
                max-width: min(620px, 56vw);
                padding: 0;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
                box-shadow: none;
                backdrop-filter: none;
            }

            #home .banner-kicker {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 14px;
                margin: 0 0 18px;
                padding: 0;
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
                color: var(--sample-gold);
                font-size: clamp(14px, 1.7vw, 20px);
                font-weight: 900;
                letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            }

            #home .banner-kicker svg {
                width: 38px;
                height: 38px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 1.7;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            #home .banner-content h2 {
                margin: 0 0 22px;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-family: "Montserrat", "Poppins", sans-serif;
                font-size: clamp(50px, 7.2vw, 88px);
                line-height: 0.92;
                letter-spacing: 0;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            #home .banner-content h2 span {
                display: block;
                font-weight: 900;
            }

            #home .banner-content h2 em {
                display: block;
                margin-top: 6px;
                color: var(--sample-gold);
                font-family: "Permanent Marker", "Brush Script MT", cursive;
                font-size: 1.16em;
                font-style: normal;
                font-weight: 400;
                line-height: 0.86;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                transform: rotate(-2deg);
            }

            #home .banner-content p {
                position: relative;
                max-width: 520px;
                margin: 0 0 34px;
                padding-left: 76px;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: clamp(16px, 1.8vw, 19px);
                line-height: 1.5;
            }

            #home .banner-content p::before {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                top: 14px;
                left: 0;
                width: 52px;
                height: 2px;
                background: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            .hero-cta-row {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 24px;
                margin-bottom: 56px;
            }

            .btn-shop-now,
            .btn-new-arrivals {
                min-width: 210px;
                min-height: 54px;
                padding: 15px 28px;
                border-radius: 4px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 18px;
                text-decoration: none;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-weight: 900;
                font-size: 14px;
                letter-spacing: 0;
                transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
            }

            .btn-shop-now {
                background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e1a72d, #ffd066);
                color: #110d03;
                box-shadow: none;
            }

            .btn-shop-now svg,
            .btn-new-arrivals svg {
                width: 22px;
                height: 22px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 2;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .btn-new-arrivals {
                border: 1px solid var(--sample-gold);
                background: transparent;
                color: #ffffff;
            }

            .btn-shop-now:hover,
            .btn-new-arrivals:hover {
                transform: translateY(-2px);
            }

            #home .hero-metrics {
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                gap: 38px;
                margin: 0;
            }

            #home .hero-metric {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 14px;
                min-width: 150px;
                padding: 0;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
            }

            #home .hero-metric svg {
                width: 38px;
                height: 38px;
                flex: 0 0 auto;
                fill: none;
                stroke: var(--sample-gold);
                stroke-width: 2;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            #home .hero-metric strong {
                display: block;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: 900;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            #home .hero-metric span {
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 1.5;
            }

            .hero-arrow {
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                z-index: 3;
                width: 46px;
                height: 46px;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 50%;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                background: rgba(13, 22, 24, 0.82);
                color: #ffffff;
                cursor: pointer;
                transform: translateY(-50%);
            }

            .hero-arrow-left {
                left: 22px;
            }

            .hero-arrow-right {
                right: 22px;
            }

            .hero-arrow svg,
            .arrival-controls svg {
                width: 24px;
                height: 24px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 2.4;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            .hero-dots {
                position: absolute;
                z-index: 3;
                left: 50%;
                bottom: 18px;
                display: flex;
                gap: 12px;
                transform: translateX(-50%);
            }

            .hero-dots button {
                width: 11px;
                height: 11px;
                padding: 0;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background: #ffffff;
                cursor: pointer;
            }

            .hero-dots button.active {
                background: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            #home .home-highlights {
                max-width: none;
                margin: 0 18px 6px;
                padding: 34px 60px;
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
                gap: 0;
                background: #101818;
                border-radius: 0 0 28px 28px;
                box-shadow: none;
            }

            #home .highlight-card {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 62px 1fr;
                grid-template-rows: auto auto;
                column-gap: 18px;
                align-items: center;
                padding: 4px 34px;
                border: 0;
                border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
                box-shadow: none;
                backdrop-filter: none;
            }

            #home .highlight-card:last-child {
                border-right: 0;
            }

            .highlight-icon {
                grid-row: 1 / span 2;
                width: 58px;
                height: 58px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background: rgba(240, 189, 61, 0.12);
                color: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            .highlight-icon svg {
                width: 32px;
                height: 32px;
                fill: none;
                stroke: currentColor;
                stroke-width: 1.9;
                stroke-linecap: round;
                stroke-linejoin: round;
            }

            #home .highlight-card strong {
                margin: 0 0 6px;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 13px;
                font-weight: 900;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            #home .highlight-card p {
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: 500;
            }

            .home-arrivals {
                padding: 42px 46px 72px;
                background: #f4f4f4;
            }

            .section-heading-row {
                position: relative;
                max-width: 1180px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                min-height: 72px;
                display: grid;
                align-items: center;
                justify-items: center;
            }

            .section-heading-row h3 {
                margin: 0;
                color: #171b1e;
                font-family: "Montserrat", "Poppins", sans-serif;
                font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 36px);
                font-weight: 900;
                letter-spacing: 0;
                text-align: center;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            .section-heading-row h3::after {
                width: 64px;
                height: 2px;
                margin-top: 14px;
                background: var(--sample-gold);
            }

            .arrival-controls {
                position: absolute;
                right: 0;
                top: 10px;
                display: flex;
                gap: 14px;
            }

            .arrival-controls button {
                width: 44px;
                height: 44px;
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background: #e9e9e9;
                color: #171b1e;
            }

            #home-arrivals-products.products {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
                max-width: 1180px;
                gap: 20px;
                padding: 18px 0 0;
            }

            .products .product {
                position: relative;
                padding: 0 0 18px;
                overflow: hidden;
                border: 0;
                border-radius: 14px;
                background: #ffffff;
                box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(7, 12, 12, 0.1);
                text-align: left;
                animation: none;
                backdrop-filter: none;
            }

            .products .product:hover {
                transform: translateY(-5px);
                box-shadow: 0 18px 34px rgba(7, 12, 12, 0.16);
            }

            #home-arrivals-products .product::before {
                content: "NEW";
                position: absolute;
                top: 12px;
                left: 12px;
                z-index: 3;
                padding: 5px 10px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                background: #01341f;
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 10px;
                font-weight: 900;
                letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            }

            .products .product-image-container {
                aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
                width: 100%;
                box-sizing: border-box;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                padding: 12px;
                overflow: hidden;
                background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f8f5 0%, #ecefeb 100%);
            }

            .products .product img {
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                display: block;
                object-fit: contain;
                object-position: center;
                border-radius: 0;
                background: transparent;
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .products .product img.is-broken {
                opacity: 0.9;
            }

            .products .product h3,
            .products .product p,
            .products .product .color-options,
            .products .product button {
                margin-left: 16px;
                margin-right: 16px;
            }

            .products .product h3 {
                margin-top: 16px;
                margin-bottom: 6px;
                color: #14191b;
                font-family: "Poppins", sans-serif;
                font-size: 15px;
                font-weight: 800;
                line-height: 1.25;
            }

            .products .product h3::after {
                display: none;
            }

            .products .product p {
                margin-top: 0;
                margin-bottom: 12px;
                color: #01341f;
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 800;
            }

            .products .product .color-options {
                justify-content: flex-start;
                margin-bottom: 12px;
            }

            .products .product button {
                width: calc(100% - 32px);
                border-radius: 5px;
                background: #0c1515;
                color: #ffffff;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-size: 12px;
            }

            .products .product button + button {
                margin-top: 8px;
                background: transparent;
                border: 1px solid #0c1515;
                color: #0c1515;
            }

            @media (max-width: 1100px) {
                header.site-header {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                    gap: 18px;
                    justify-items: center;
                    padding: 18px 22px 26px;
                }

                .primary-nav ul {
                    flex-wrap: wrap;
                    row-gap: 4px;
                }

                #home .home-highlights,
                #home-arrivals-products.products {
                    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
                }

                #home .highlight-card:nth-child(2) {
                    border-right: 0;
                }

                #home .highlight-card {
                    padding: 20px 24px;
                    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
                }

                #home .highlight-card:nth-child(n + 3) {
                    border-bottom: 0;
                }
            }

            @media (max-width: 760px) {
                .top-deal-strip .banner-inner {
                    padding: 10px 0;
                    gap: 10px;
                }

                .top-deal-strip .banner-separator {
                    display: none;
                }

                header.site-header {
                    min-height: 0;
                }

                .site-header .logo h1 span {
                    font-size: 48px;
                }

                .site-header .logo h1 em {
                    font-size: 12px;
                }

                .site-header .logo a,
                .site-header .brand-logo-img {
                    width: 118px;
                }

                .primary-nav ul {
                    gap: 14px;
                }

                .primary-nav ul li a {
                    font-size: 12px;
                    padding-bottom: 8px;
                }

                .header-actions {
                    gap: 14px;
                }

                .bag-button.cart-link {
                    width: 60px;
                    height: 60px;
                }

                #home .main-banner {
                    min-height: 650px;
                    margin: 0 12px;
                    padding: 38px 24px 96px;
                    align-items: flex-end;
                }

                #home .hero-slide .hero-photo {
                    top: 26%;
                    right: 0;
                    width: 100%;
                    height: 56%;
                    opacity: 0.72;
                    object-position: center;
                }

                #home .hero-slide-main .hero-photo {
                    width: 100%;
                    height: 58%;
                    object-position: center bottom;
                }

                #home .main-banner::before {
                    background:
                        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 8, 5, 0.28), rgba(0, 8, 5, 0.98) 62%),
                        radial-gradient(circle at 35% 55%, rgba(0, 63, 33, 0.62), transparent 42%);
                }

                #home .main-banner::after {
                    left: 58%;
                    opacity: 0.55;
                }

                #home .banner-content {
                    max-width: 100%;
                }

                #home .banner-content h2 {
                    font-size: clamp(42px, 14vw, 64px);
                }

                #home .banner-content p {
                    padding-left: 0;
                }

                #home .banner-content p::before {
                    display: none;
                }

                .hero-cta-row {
                    gap: 12px;
                    margin-bottom: 28px;
                }

                .btn-shop-now,
                .btn-new-arrivals {
                    width: 100%;
                    min-width: 0;
                }

                #home .hero-metrics {
                    gap: 18px;
                }

                .hero-arrow {
                    width: 38px;
                    height: 38px;
                }

                #home .home-highlights,
                #home-arrivals-products.products {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                }

                #home .home-highlights {
                    margin: 0 12px 6px;
                    padding: 20px;
                }

                #home .highlight-card {
                    border-right: 0;
                    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
                }

                #home .highlight-card:last-child {
                    border-bottom: 0;
                }

                .home-arrivals {
                    padding: 36px 20px 58px;
                }

                .section-heading-row {
                    justify-items: start;
                }

                .section-heading-row h3 {
                    text-align: left;
                }

                .section-heading-row h3::after {
                    margin-left: 0;
                }

                .arrival-controls {
                    right: 0;
                }
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <!-- Flashing Banner -->
        <div id="flashing-banner" role="marquee" aria-label="Promotions">

            <!-- Left: live indicator -->
            <div class="banner-live">
                <span class="banner-live-dot"></span>
                <span class="banner-live-label">I&amp;R Emporio</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Centre: scrolling ticker -->
            <div class="banner-marquee-wrap">
                <div class="banner-marquee-track">

                    <!-- SET 1 -->
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-fire">🔥 Hot Deals</span>
                        Up to <strong>50% OFF</strong> on selected items this week!
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-cod">💵 COD</span>
                        <strong>Cash on Delivery</strong> available nationwide
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        No card needed!
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-ship">🚚 Free Shipping</span>
                        On orders <strong>&#8369;500 &amp; above</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-new">✨ New Arrivals</span>
                        Fresh drops every <strong>Friday</strong> — don't miss out
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-sale">🏷️ Sale</span>
                        T-shirts from <strong>&#8369;199</strong>
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        Sportswear from <strong>&#8369;299</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-fire">🔥 Hot Deals</span>
                        Buy 2 Get <strong>1 FREE</strong> on all graphic tees
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-cod">💵 COD</span>
                        <strong>Pay when it arrives</strong> — 100% safe &amp; easy
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        🌟 <strong>Wear With Attitude</strong>
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        Cebu's go-to fashion store
                    </div>

                    <!-- SET 2 (clone for seamless loop) -->
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-fire">🔥 Hot Deals</span>
                        Up to <strong>50% OFF</strong> on selected items this week!
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-cod">💵 COD</span>
                        <strong>Cash on Delivery</strong> available nationwide
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        No card needed!
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-ship">🚚 Free Shipping</span>
                        On orders <strong>&#8369;500 &amp; above</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-new">✨ New Arrivals</span>
                        Fresh drops every <strong>Friday</strong> — don't miss out
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-sale">🏷️ Sale</span>
                        T-shirts from <strong>&#8369;199</strong>
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        Sportswear from <strong>&#8369;299</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-fire">🔥 Hot Deals</span>
                        Buy 2 Get <strong>1 FREE</strong> on all graphic tees
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        <span class="bm-pill bm-pill-cod">💵 COD</span>
                        <strong>Pay when it arrives</strong> — 100% safe &amp; easy
                    </div>
                    <div class="bm-item">
                        🌟 <strong>Wear With Attitude</strong>
                        <span class="bm-dot-divider"></span>
                        Cebu's go-to fashion store
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right: CTA button -->
            <div class="banner-cta-wrap">
                <a href="#products" class="banner-cta-btn">Shop Now →</a>
            </div>

        </div>

        <!-- Header -->
        <header class="site-header">
            <div class="logo">
                <a href="#" onclick="showSection('home')" aria-label="I and R Emporio home">
                    <img class="brand-logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="I&amp;R Emporio" />
                </a>
            </div>
            <nav class="primary-nav" aria-label="Primary navigation">
                <ul>
                    <li><a class="active" href="#" onclick="showSection('home')">Home</a></li>
                    <li class="dropdown">
                        <a href="#" onclick="toggleDropdown('men')">Men <span class="nav-caret">&#9662;</span></a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-content" id="men-dropdown">
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('men-tshirts')">T-Shirts</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('men-shorts-trousers')">Shorts &amp; Trousers</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('men-sportswear')">Sportswear</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('men-innerwear')">Innerwear</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </li>
                    <li class="dropdown">
                        <a href="#" onclick="toggleDropdown('women')">Women <span class="nav-caret">&#9662;</span></a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-content" id="women-dropdown">
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('women-tshirts')">T-Shirts</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('women-shorts-trousers')">Shorts &amp; Trousers</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('women-sportswear')">Sportswear</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('women-innerwear')">Innerwear</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </li>
                    <li class="dropdown">
                        <a href="#" onclick="toggleDropdown('kids')">Kids <span class="nav-caret">&#9662;</span></a>
                        <ul class="dropdown-content" id="kids-dropdown">
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('kids-tshirts')">T-Shirts</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('kids-shorts-trousers')">Shorts &amp; Trousers</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('kids-sportswear')">Sportswear</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('kids-innerwear')">Innerwear</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </li>
                    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('men-sportswear')">Sportswear</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('trending')">Accessories</a></li>
                </ul>
            </nav>
            <div class="header-actions">
                <label class="nav-search" aria-label="Search products">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
                        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"></circle>
                        <path d="M20 20l-4.2-4.2"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <input type="text" id="search-bar" placeholder="Search" oninput="searchProducts()" />
                </label>
                <a href="#" onclick="showSection('account')" class="account-icon-link" aria-label="Open account">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M20 21a8 8 0 0 0-16 0"></path>
                        <circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"></circle>
                    </svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#" onclick="showSection('cart')" class="cart-link bag-button" aria-label="Open shopping bag">
                    <span class="cart-icon-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
                        <svg class="cart-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M6.5 8h11l-1 10.5a2 2 0 0 1-2 1.5h-5a2 2 0 0 1-2-1.5L6.5 8Z"></path>
                            <path d="M9 9V7a3 3 0 0 1 6 0v2"></path>
                            <path d="M10 12.5a2 2 0 0 0 4 0"></path>
                        </svg>
                        <span class="cart-count is-empty">0</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="cart-label">Bag</span>
                </a>
                <button id="theme-toggle" class="theme-toggle utility-hidden" type="button" aria-label="Toggle theme">&#127774;</button>
            </div>
        </header>

        <div id="cart-popup" class="cart-popup hidden">Item added to cart!</div>

        <!-- Add preview container -->
        <div id="preview-container" class="preview-container hidden">
            <img id="preview-image" class="preview-image" />
        </div>
        <!-- Add Cart Section -->
        <section id="cart" class="hidden">

                        <p class="cart-kicker">Shopping bag</p>
                        <h3>Your Cart</h3>

                <label>Size:</label>

        <!-- Sections -->
        <section id="about" class="hidden">
            <div class="about-container">
                <h2>About Us</h2>
                <p class="slogan">Wear With Attitude</p>
                <p>
                    At <strong>I&R EMPORIO</strong>, we believe that fashion is more than just clothingâ€”itâ€™s a
                    statement. Our slogan, <em>"Wear With Attitude,"</em> reflects our mission to empower you to express
                    your unique style with confidence. Whether you're looking for the latest trends or timeless
                    classics, weâ€™ve got you covered.
                </p>

                <h3>Who We Are</h3>
                <p>
                    We are a modern, forward-thinking fashion brand dedicated to bringing you the
                    <strong>hottest and most trending items</strong> at <strong>affordable prices</strong>. Our
                    carefully curated collections are designed to cater to every style, occasion, and personality. From
                    casual wear to statement pieces, we ensure that every product reflects quality, comfort, and style.
                </p>

                <h3>Our Mission</h3>
                <p>
                    Our mission is simple: to make high-quality, trendy fashion accessible to everyone. We understand
                    that looking good shouldnâ€™t come at a high cost, which is why we strive to offer the
                    <strong>best products at prices that wonâ€™t break the bank</strong>. Weâ€™re committed to helping you
                    stay ahead of the fashion curve without compromising on quality or your budget.
                </p>

                <h3>Why Choose Us?</h3>
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <strong>Trendsetting Collections</strong>: We stay on top of the latest fashion trends so you
                        donâ€™t have to. Our collections are updated regularly to keep your wardrobe fresh and stylish.
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <strong>Affordable Luxury</strong>: We believe that everyone deserves to look and feel their
                        best. Thatâ€™s why we offer premium-quality products at prices that are easy on your wallet.
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <strong>Efficient Shipping</strong>: We know how exciting it is to receive your new favorite
                        outfit. Thatâ€™s why we provide <strong>fast and low-cost shipping</strong> to get your order to
                        you as quickly as possible.
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <strong>Customer-Centric Approach</strong>: Your satisfaction is our priority. Our dedicated
                        customer service team is always here to assist you, ensuring a seamless shopping experience from
                        start to finish.
                    </li>
                </ul>

                <h3>Our Promise</h3>
                <p>
                    At <strong>I&R EMPORIO </strong>, weâ€™re not just selling clothesâ€”weâ€™re helping you create a
                    lifestyle. Weâ€™re passionate about delivering exceptional value, outstanding service, and a shopping
                    experience that leaves you feeling confident and inspired.
                </p>
                <p class="call-to-action">
                    Join us on this journey to redefine fashion. <strong>Wear With Attitude</strong> and let your style
                    speak for itself.
                </p>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Firebase Integration -->
       <!-- Clerk Authentication Integration -->
<script async crossorigin="anonymous" 
    data-clerk-publishable-key="pk_test_dHJ1c3R5LWRyYWdvbi0yMy5jbGVyay5hY2NvdW50cy5kZXYk"
    src="https://trusty-dragon-23.clerk.accounts.dev/npm/@clerk/clerk-js@latest/dist/clerk.browser.js">
</script>

<script>
    // Clerk Authentication Setup
    let clerk;
    
    window.addEventListener('load', async () => {
        const ClerkClient = window.Clerk;
        if (!ClerkClient) return;

        try {
            clerk = typeof ClerkClient === 'function'
                ? new ClerkClient('pk_test_dHJ1c3R5LWRyYWdvbi0yMy5jbGVyay5hY2NvdW50cy5kZXYk')
                : ClerkClient;

            if (typeof clerk.load === 'function') {
                await clerk.load();
            }
        } catch (error) {
            clerk = null;
            return;
        }
        
        // Update UI based on auth state
        if (typeof clerk.addListener === 'function') {
            clerk.addListener(({ user }) => {
            updateAuthUI(user);
            });
        }
        
        // Initialize UI
        updateAuthUI(clerk.user || null);
    });
    
    // Helper function to check if user is logged in
    function isUserLoggedIn() {
        return clerk && clerk.user !== null;
    }
    
    // Generate member ID from Clerk user
    function generateMemberId() {
        const user = clerk?.user;
        return user ? `IR-${user.id.substring(0, 8).toUpperCase()}` : 'IR-GUEST';
    }
    
    // Update UI based on authentication state
    function updateAuthUI(user) {
        const accountLink = document.querySelector('a[onclick="showSection(\'account\')"]');
        if (user) {
            if (accountLink) {
                accountLink.setAttribute('aria-label', `Open account for ${user.firstName || 'member'}`);
                accountLink.setAttribute('title', user.firstName || 'Account');
            }
        } else {
            if (accountLink) {
                accountLink.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Open account');
                accountLink.setAttribute('title', 'Account');
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Sign Out function
    async function signOut() {
        if (clerk) {
            await clerk.signOut();
            updateAuthUI(null);
            showSection("home");
        }
    }

            // JavaScript for theme toggle
            const themeToggle = document.getElementById("theme-toggle");
            if (themeToggle) {
                themeToggle.addEventListener("click", function () {
                    document.body.classList.toggle("dark-mode");
                    themeToggle.textContent = document.body.classList.contains("dark-mode")
                        ? String.fromCodePoint(0x1F319)
                        : String.fromCodePoint(0x1F31E);
                });
            }

            // Show and hide sections
            function showSection(section) {
                // Hide search results when navigating to other sections
                document.getElementById("search-results").classList.add("hidden");

                const allSections = document.querySelectorAll("section");
                allSections.forEach(function (sec) {
                    sec.classList.add("hidden");
                });
                const selectedSection = document.getElementById(section);
                if (selectedSection) {
                    selectedSection.classList.remove("hidden");
                }
                if (section === "home") {
                    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
                } else if (selectedSection) {
                    selectedSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
                }
            }

            // Show and hide sub-sections
            function showSubSection(subSection) {
                document.querySelectorAll(".account-form").forEach((form) => {
                    form.classList.add("hidden");
                });
                document.getElementById(subSection).classList.remove("hidden");

                if (subSection === "membership-card") {
                    generateMembershipCard();
                }
            }

            function initHeroCarousel() {
                const banner = document.querySelector("#home .main-banner");
                const slides = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#home .hero-slide"));
                const dots = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#home .hero-dots button"));
                const prevButton = document.querySelector(".hero-arrow-left");
                const nextButton = document.querySelector(".hero-arrow-right");
                const kicker = document.getElementById("hero-kicker-text");
                const titleTop = document.getElementById("hero-title-top");
                const titleAccent = document.getElementById("hero-title-accent");
                const copy = document.getElementById("hero-copy");

                if (!banner || slides.length === 0) return;

                let currentIndex = slides.findIndex((slide) => slide.classList.contains("is-active"));
                if (currentIndex < 0) currentIndex = 0;
                let carouselTimer;

                function syncHeroCopy(slide) {
                    if (kicker) kicker.textContent = slide.dataset.kicker || "Trendy. Affordable. Premium.";
                    if (titleTop) titleTop.textContent = slide.dataset.titleTop || "Wear With";
                    if (titleAccent) titleAccent.textContent = slide.dataset.titleAccent || "Attitude";
                    if (copy) copy.innerHTML = slide.dataset.copy || "Premium fashion for men, women &amp; kids.<br />Quality you feel. Style that speaks.";
                }

                function showHeroSlide(nextIndex) {
                    if (nextIndex === currentIndex || nextIndex < 0 || nextIndex >= slides.length) return;

                    const currentSlide = slides[currentIndex];
                    const nextSlide = slides[nextIndex];

                    banner.classList.remove("hero-is-animating");
                    void banner.offsetWidth;
                    banner.classList.add("hero-is-animating");

                    slides.forEach((slide) => slide.classList.remove("is-leaving"));
                    currentSlide.classList.remove("is-active");
                    currentSlide.classList.add("is-leaving");
                    nextSlide.classList.add("is-active");
                    syncHeroCopy(nextSlide);

                    dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                        dot.classList.toggle("active", index === nextIndex);
                        dot.setAttribute("aria-current", index === nextIndex ? "true" : "false");
                    });

                    currentIndex = nextIndex;
                    window.setTimeout(() => currentSlide.classList.remove("is-leaving"), 1150);
                }

                function showNextSlide() {
                    showHeroSlide((currentIndex + 1) % slides.length);
                }

                function showPreviousSlide() {
                    showHeroSlide((currentIndex - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length);
                }

                function restartCarouselTimer() {
                    window.clearInterval(carouselTimer);
                    carouselTimer = window.setInterval(showNextSlide, 5200);
                }

                if (prevButton) {
                    prevButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
                        showPreviousSlide();
                        restartCarouselTimer();
                    });
                }

                if (nextButton) {
                    nextButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
                        showNextSlide();
                        restartCarouselTimer();
                    });
                }

                dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.addEventListener("click", () => {
                        showHeroSlide(index);
                        restartCarouselTimer();
                    });
                });

                syncHeroCopy(slides[currentIndex]);
                restartCarouselTimer();
            }

            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", initHeroCarousel);

            // Back to top button functionality
            const backToTopButton = document.getElementById("back-to-top");
            window.addEventListener("scroll", function () {
                if (window.scrollY > 300) {
                    backToTopButton.style.display = "block";
                } else {
                    backToTopButton.style.display = "none";
                }
            });

            backToTopButton.addEventListener("click", function () {
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
            });

                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Polyester Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {

                ],
                kids: [
                    {

                        fabric: "100% Cotton",

                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
