                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#000000", "#808080", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#000000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#808080": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Polyester Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Denim Jacket",
                        price: "$40.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#0000ff", "#000000"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#0000ff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#000000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Denim",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Joggers",
                        price: "$25.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#000000", "#808080", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#000000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#808080": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Cotton Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Dress",
                        price: "$35.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#ff0000", "#0000ff", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#ff0000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#0000ff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Polyester",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Polo Shirt",
                        price: "$22.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#ffffff", "#0000ff", "#ff0000"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#0000ff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ff0000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Cotton Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Sweater",
                        price: "$28.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#000000", "#808080", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#000000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#808080": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Wool Blend",
                        care: "Hand Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Skirt",
                        price: "$18.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#ff0000", "#0000ff", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#ff0000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#0000ff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Cotton Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Pajama Set",
                        price: "$32.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#000000", "#808080", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#000000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#808080": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Cotton Blend",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    },
                    {
                        name: "Kids' Raincoat",
                        price: "$45.00",
                        image: "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                        sizes: ["2-3Y", "4-5Y", "6-7Y", "8-9Y", "10-11Y"],
                        colors: ["#0000ff", "#ff0000", "#ffffff"],
                        colorImages: {
                            "#0000ff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ff0000": "https://via.placeholder.com/150",
                            "#ffffff": "https://via.placeholder.com/150"
                        },
                        fabric: "Polyester",
                        care: "Machine Wash",
                        additionalImages: []
                    }
                ]
            };

            const PRODUCT_IMAGE_FALLBACK =
                "data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 600'%3E%3Crect width='600' height='600' fill='%23eef0ed'/%3E%3Cpath d='M175 225h250v210H175z' fill='none' stroke='%2303341f' stroke-width='16'/%3E%3Cpath d='M225 225v-35c0-42 33-75 75-75s75 33 75 75v35' fill='none' stroke='%23f4bf3f' stroke-width='16' stroke-linecap='round'/%3E%3Ctext x='300' y='490' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial,sans-serif' font-size='34' font-weight='700' fill='%2303341f'%3EI%26R EMPORIO%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

            function handleProductImageError(image) {
                image.onerror = null;
                image.src = PRODUCT_IMAGE_FALLBACK;
                image.classList.add("is-broken");
            }

            function normalizeProductImageSource(source) {
                if (!source || source.includes("via.placeholder.com")) {
                    return PRODUCT_IMAGE_FALLBACK;
                }

                return source;
            }

            function normalizeColorImageMap(colorImages = {}) {
                return Object.entries(colorImages).reduce((images, [color, source]) => {
                    images[color] = normalizeProductImageSource(source);
                    return images;
                }, {});
            }

            function renderProducts(sectionId, productsArray) {
                const section = document.getElementById(sectionId);
                if (!section) return;

                const productsHTML = productsArray
                    .map((product, index) => {
                        const { imgSrc, imageData, hasMultipleImages } = getProductImageData(product);

                        return `
            <div class="product">
                <div class="product-image-container">
                    <img class="lazy-load" src="${imgSrc}" data-src="${imgSrc}" alt="${product.name}" loading="lazy" 
                         onerror="handleProductImageError(this)"
                         onclick="openLightbox(${index}, '${sectionId}')"
                         ${hasMultipleImages ? 'data-images="' + imageData + '"' : ""}>
                    ${hasMultipleImages ? `<div class="auto-slideshow-indicator">ðŸ”„</div>` : ""}
                </div>
                <h3>${product.name}</h3>
                <p>${product.price}</p>
                <div class="color-options">
                    ${generateColorOptions(product.colors, imageData, product.colorImages)}
                </div>
                <button onclick="addToCart(${JSON.stringify(product).replace(/"/g, "&quot;")})">Add to Cart</button>
                <button onclick="toggleDetails(${JSON.stringify(product).replace(/"/g, "&quot;")})">Details</button>
            </div>
        `;
                    })
                    .join("");

                section.innerHTML = productsHTML;
                initializeAutoSlideshow();
            }

            // Helper function to get product image data
            function getProductImageData(product) {
                const imageArray = (Array.isArray(product.image) ? product.image : [product.image]).map(normalizeProductImageSource);
                const imgSrc = imageArray[0];
                const imageData = encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(imageArray));
                const hasMultipleImages = imageArray.length >= 2;

                return { imgSrc, imageData, hasMultipleImages };
            }

            // Helper function to generate color options HTML
            function generateColorOptions(colors, imageData, colorImages) {
                return colors
                    .map((color, colorIndex) => {
                        // Encode the colorImages object as a JSON string and escape it for HTML
                        const encodedColorImages = encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(normalizeColorImageMap(colorImages)));
                        return `
            <span class="color-option" 
                  style="background-color: ${color.toLowerCase()};" 
                  title="${color}"
                  onclick="changeProductImage(event, '${imageData}', ${colorIndex}, '${encodedColorImages}')"></span>
        `;
                    })
                    .join("");
            }
            // New changeProductImage function with decoding
            function changeProductImage(event, images, colorIndex, colorImages) {
                let imageArray;
                try {
                    // Decode the encoded JSON string and parse it
                    imageArray = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(images));
                    console.log("Decoded imageArray:", imageArray); // Debugging
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error("Error parsing image data:", e);
                    return;
                }

                // Decode and parse the colorImages object
                let colorImageMap;
                try {
                    colorImageMap = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(colorImages));
                    console.log("Parsed colorImageMap:", colorImageMap); // Debugging
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error("Error parsing colorImages:", e);
                    return;
                }

                // Get the selected color
                const selectedColor = event.target.getAttribute("title");
                console.log("Selected color:", selectedColor); // Debugging

                // Update the image based on the selected color
                if (colorImageMap && colorImageMap[selectedColor]) {
                    const productElem = event.target.closest(".product");
                    if (productElem) {
                        const imgElem = productElem.querySelector("img");
                        if (imgElem) {
                            const selectedImage = normalizeProductImageSource(colorImageMap[selectedColor]);
                            imgElem.classList.remove("is-broken");
                            imgElem.src = selectedImage;
                            console.log("Updated image src to:", selectedImage); // Debugging

                            // Update the lightbox images if it's open
                            if (document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.contains("hidden") === false) {
                                currentImageArray = [selectedImage];
                                if (productElem.additionalImages) {
                                    currentImageArray.push(...productElem.additionalImages);
                                }
                                updateLightboxImage();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    console.error("No image found for selected color:", selectedColor);
                }
            }
            // Render products for each section
            renderProducts("trending-products", products.trending, {
                title: "Trending T-Shirts",
                size: "S, M, L, XL",
                fabric: "100% Cotton",
                packingSize: "30x30x5 cm"
            });

            renderProducts("home-arrivals-products", products.trending.slice(0, 4), {
                title: "New Arrivals",
                size: "S, M, L, XL",
                fabric: "100% Cotton",
                packingSize: "30x30x5 cm"
            });

            renderProducts("men-products", products.men, {
                title: "Men's T-Shirts",
                size: "S, M, L, XL, XXL",
                fabric: "Cotton Blend",
                packingSize: "35x35x6 cm"
            });

            renderProducts("women-products", products.women, {
                title: "Women's T-Shirts",
                size: "XS, S, M, L, XL",
                fabric: "Organic Cotton",
                packingSize: "32x32x4 cm"
            });

            renderProducts("kids-products", products.kids, {
                title: "Kids' T-Shirts",
                size: "2-3Y, 4-5Y, 6-7Y, 8-9Y, 10-11Y",
                fabric: "Soft Jersey",
                packingSize: "25x25x3 cm"
            });
            // Lazy loading script
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
                const lazyImages = document.querySelectorAll(".lazy-load");

                const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
                    entries.forEach((entry) => {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            const img = entry.target;
                            img.src = img.dataset.src;
                            img.classList.remove("lazy-load");
                            observer.unobserve(img);
                        }
                    });
                });

                lazyImages.forEach((img) => {
                    observer.observe(img);
                });
            });

            // Cart functionality
            let cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("cart")) || [];
            const FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD = 35;
            const STANDARD_SHIPPING_FEE = 4.99;
            let cartNotificationTimer;
            let cartNotificationHideTimer;

            function saveCart() {
                localStorage.setItem("cart", JSON.stringify(cart));
            }

            function parsePrice(price) {
                return Number(String(price).replace(/[^0-9.]/g, "")) || 0;
            }

            function formatCurrency(amount) {
                return `$${amount.toFixed(2)}`;
            }

            function escapeHtml(value = "") {
                return String(value).replace(/[&<>"']/g, (character) => {
                    const entities = {
                        "&": "&amp;",
                        "<": "&lt;",
                        ">": "&gt;",
                        '"': "&quot;",
                        "'": "&#39;"
                    };
                    return entities[character] || character;
                });
            }

            function getCartCount() {
                return cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
            }

            function getCartSubtotal() {
                return cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + parsePrice(item.price) * item.quantity, 0);
            }

            function getEstimatedShipping(subtotal = getCartSubtotal()) {
                if (subtotal === 0) return 0;
                return subtotal >= FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD ? 0 : STANDARD_SHIPPING_FEE;
            }

            function getCartTotal() {
                const subtotal = getCartSubtotal();
                return subtotal + getEstimatedShipping(subtotal);
            }

            function renderCartChip(label, value, showSwatch = false) {
                if (!value) return "";

                const swatch = showSwatch
                    ? `<span class="color-swatch" style="background-color: ${escapeHtml(value)};"></span>`
                    : "";

                return `
                    <span class="cart-chip">
                        ${swatch}
                        <span>${escapeHtml(label)}: ${escapeHtml(value)}</span>
                    </span>
                `;
            }

            function getCartThumbnail(item) {
                if (item.image) {
                    return `<div class="cart-thumb"><img src="${escapeHtml(item.image)}" alt="${escapeHtml(item.name)}"></div>`;
                }

                return `
                    <div class="cart-thumb cart-thumb-placeholder" aria-hidden="true">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path d="M6.5 8h11l-1 10.5a2 2 0 0 1-2 1.5h-5a2 2 0 0 1-2-1.5L6.5 8Z"></path>
                            <path d="M9 9V7a3 3 0 0 1 6 0v2"></path>
                            <path d="M10 12.5a2 2 0 0 0 4 0"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            // Function to add an item to the cart
            function addToCart(product, size = null, color = null) {
                const resolvedSize = size ?? product.size ?? null;
                const resolvedColor = color ?? product.color ?? null;
                const resolvedImage = Array.isArray(product.image) ? product.image[0] : product.image ?? "";
                const existingItem = cart.find(
                    (item) => item.name === product.name && item.size === resolvedSize && item.color === resolvedColor
                );

                if (existingItem) {
                    existingItem.quantity += 1;
                    if (!existingItem.image && resolvedImage) {
                        existingItem.image = resolvedImage;
                    }
                } else {
                    cart.push({
                        name: product.name,
                        price: product.price,
                        size: resolvedSize,
                        color: resolvedColor,
                        image: resolvedImage,
                        quantity: 1
                    });
                }

                saveCart();
                updateCartIcon();
                showCartNotification(
                    `${product.name}${resolvedSize || resolvedColor ? ` (${resolvedSize || "No size"}/${resolvedColor || "No color"})` : ""} added to bag!`
                );
                updateCartDisplay();
            }

            // Function to remove an item from the cart
            function removeFromCart(productName, size, color) {
                cart = cart.filter(
                    (item) => !(item.name === productName && item.size === size && item.color === color)
                );
                saveCart();
                updateCartIcon();
                showCartNotification(`${productName} removed from bag.`);
                updateCartDisplay();
            }

            function removeCartItemByIndex(index) {
                const item = cart[index];
                if (!item) return;

                cart.splice(index, 1);
                saveCart();
                updateCartIcon();
                showCartNotification(`${item.name} removed from bag.`);
                updateCartDisplay();
            }

            // Function to update the quantity of an item in the cart
            function updateCartItemQuantity(productName, size, color, quantity) {
                const item = cart.find(
                    (item) => item.name === productName && item.size === size && item.color === color
                );

                if (!item) return;

                item.quantity = quantity;
                if (item.quantity <= 0) {
                    removeFromCart(productName, size, color);
                    return;
                }

                saveCart();
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
            }

            function updateCartItemQuantityByIndex(index, quantity) {
                const item = cart[index];
                if (!item) return;

                if (quantity <= 0) {
                    removeCartItemByIndex(index);
                    return;
                }

                item.quantity = quantity;
                saveCart();
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
            }

            function clearCart() {
                if (!cart.length) {
                    showCartNotification("Your bag is already empty.");
                    return;
                }

                cart = [];
                localStorage.removeItem("cart");
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
                showCartNotification("Your bag has been cleared.");
            }

            // Function to update the cart icon
            function updateCartIcon() {
                const cartCountElement = document.querySelector(".cart-count");
                const cartLink = document.querySelector(".cart-link");
                if (!cartCountElement || !cartLink) return;

                const cartCount = getCartCount();
                cartCountElement.textContent = cartCount;
                cartCountElement.classList.toggle("is-empty", cartCount === 0);
                cartLink.classList.toggle("has-items", cartCount > 0);
                cartLink.setAttribute(
                    "aria-label",
                    cartCount > 0
                        ? `Open shopping bag with ${cartCount} item${cartCount === 1 ? "" : "s"}`
                        : "Open shopping bag"
                );
            }

            // Function to update the cart display
            function updateCartDisplay() {
                const cartItemsElement = document.getElementById("cart-items");
                if (!cartItemsElement) return;

                const itemCount = getCartCount();
                const subtotal = getCartSubtotal();
                const shipping = getEstimatedShipping(subtotal);
                const total = subtotal + shipping;
                const remainingForFreeShipping = Math.max(0, FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD - subtotal);
                const freeShippingMessage =
                    itemCount === 0
                        ? `Spend ${formatCurrency(FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD)} to unlock free shipping.`
                        : remainingForFreeShipping === 0
                          ? "Nice — you unlocked free shipping for this order."
                          : `Add ${formatCurrency(remainingForFreeShipping)} more to unlock free shipping.`;

                if (!cart.length) {
                    cartItemsElement.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="cart-empty-state">
                            <div class="cart-empty-icon" aria-hidden="true">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                    <path d="M6.5 8h11l-1 10.5a2 2 0 0 1-2 1.5h-5a2 2 0 0 1-2-1.5L6.5 8Z"></path>
                                    <path d="M9 9V7a3 3 0 0 1 6 0v2"></path>
                                    <path d="M10 12.5a2 2 0 0 0 4 0"></path>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <h4>Your bag is feeling light</h4>
                            <p>Add a few standout pieces and they’ll appear here with a cleaner summary and faster checkout.</p>
                            <div class="cart-empty-actions">
                                <button class="cart-cta cart-cta-inline" onclick="showSection('trending')">Shop Trending</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    return;
                }

                const itemCards = cart
                    .map((item, index) => {
                        const itemSubtotal = parsePrice(item.price) * item.quantity;
                        return `
                            <article class="cart-item">
                                <div class="cart-item-main">
                                    <div class="cart-item-top">
                                        ${getCartThumbnail(item)}
                                        <div>
                                            <div class="cart-item-title-row">
                                                <div>
                                                    <h4>${escapeHtml(item.name)}</h4>
                                                    <p class="cart-line-price">Unit price · ${escapeHtml(item.price)}</p>
                                                </div>
                                                <div class="cart-item-subtotal">${formatCurrency(itemSubtotal)}</div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="cart-meta">
                                                ${renderCartChip("Size", item.size)}
                                                ${renderCartChip("Color", item.color, Boolean(item.color))}
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="cart-item-actions">
                                        <div class="quantity-controls" aria-label="Quantity controls for ${escapeHtml(item.name)}">
                                            <button type="button" aria-label="Decrease quantity" onclick="updateCartItemQuantityByIndex(${index}, ${item.quantity - 1})">−</button>
                                            <span class="quantity-value">${item.quantity}</span>
                                            <button type="button" aria-label="Increase quantity" onclick="updateCartItemQuantityByIndex(${index}, ${item.quantity + 1})">+</button>
                                        </div>
                                        <button type="button" class="cart-remove-btn" onclick="removeCartItemByIndex(${index})">Remove</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        `;
                    })
                    .join("");

                cartItemsElement.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="cart-layout">
                        <div class="cart-panel">
                            <div class="cart-panel-header">
                                <div>
                                    <h4>${itemCount} item${itemCount === 1 ? "" : "s"} in your bag</h4>
                                    <p class="cart-panel-subtext">Quantities update instantly and your selections are saved locally.</p>
                                </div>
                                <button class="cart-secondary-btn" onclick="showSection('trending')">Add More</button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="cart-items-list">
                                ${itemCards}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <aside class="cart-summary-card">
                            <span class="cart-summary-eyebrow">Order Summary</span>
                            <h4>Ready to checkout?</h4>
                            <p>Everything you need is grouped here for a faster decision.</p>
                            <div class="cart-progress">
                                <p class="cart-progress-text">${freeShippingMessage}</p>
                                <div class="cart-progress-bar">
                                    <div class="cart-progress-fill" style="width: ${Math.min(100, (subtotal / FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD) * 100)}%"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="cart-summary-line">
                                <span>Items</span>
                                <strong>${itemCount}</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="cart-summary-line">
                                <span>Subtotal</span>
                                <strong>${formatCurrency(subtotal)}</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="cart-summary-line">
                                <span>Shipping</span>
                                <strong>${shipping === 0 ? "Free" : formatCurrency(shipping)}</strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="cart-summary-line cart-summary-total">
                                <span>Total</span>
                                <strong>${formatCurrency(total)}</strong>
                            </div>
                            <button class="cart-cta" onclick="checkout()">Secure Checkout</button>
                            <p class="cart-note">Taxes and final delivery adjustments can be confirmed at payment.</p>
                        </aside>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            // Function to show a cart notification
            function showCartNotification(message) {
                const cartPopup = document.getElementById("cart-popup");
                if (!cartPopup) return;

                clearTimeout(cartNotificationTimer);
                clearTimeout(cartNotificationHideTimer);

                cartPopup.textContent = message;
                cartPopup.classList.remove("hidden");

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    cartPopup.classList.add("show");
                });

                cartNotificationTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                    cartPopup.classList.remove("show");
                    cartNotificationHideTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                        cartPopup.classList.add("hidden");
                    }, 240);
                }, 2400);
            }

            // Function to checkout
            function checkout() {
                const itemCount = getCartCount();
                if (itemCount === 0) {
                    alert("Your cart is empty!");
                    return;
                }

                const orderTotal = getCartTotal();
                alert(`Thank you for your purchase! Your order total is ${formatCurrency(orderTotal)}.`);

                if (typeof addLoyaltyPoints === "function") {
                    addLoyaltyPoints(itemCount * 10);
                }

                cart = [];
                localStorage.removeItem("cart");
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
                showCartNotification("Order placed successfully!");
            }

            // Initialize cart display on page load
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
            });
            // Previous JavaScript code remains the same until the searchProducts function
            // Update the searchProducts function
            function searchProducts() {
                const query = document.getElementById("search-bar").value.toLowerCase();
                if (!query) {
                    showSection("home");
                    return;
                }

                const allProducts = [...products.trending, ...products.men, ...products.women, ...products.kids];
                const filteredProducts = allProducts.filter((product) => product.name.toLowerCase().includes(query));

                // Hide all sections
                document.querySelectorAll("section").forEach((sec) => sec.classList.add("hidden"));

                // Show search results section
                const searchSection = document.getElementById("search-results");
                const productsContainer = searchSection.querySelector(".products");
                const noResultsMessage = searchSection.querySelector("#no-results-message");
                searchSection.classList.remove("hidden");

                // Clear previous results
                productsContainer.innerHTML = "";

                if (filteredProducts.length === 0) {
                    // No products found, show the "No results" message
                    noResultsMessage.classList.remove("hidden");
                } else {
                    // Products found, hide the "No results" message and display the products
                    noResultsMessage.classList.add("hidden");
                    productsContainer.innerHTML = filteredProducts
                        .map(
                            (product, index) => `
            <div class="product">
                <img src="${product.image}" alt="${product.name}" loading="lazy" 
                     onclick="openLightbox(${index}, 'search-results')">
                <h3>${product.name}</h3>
                <p>${product.price}</p>
                <button onclick="addToCart(${JSON.stringify(product).replace(/"/g, "&quot;")})">Add to Cart</button>
            </div>
        `
                        )
                        .join("");
                }
            }

            // Helper function to find product category
            function getProductCategory(product) {
                for (const category in products) {
                    if (products[category].includes(product)) {
                        return `${category}-products`;
                    }
                }
                return "";
            }

            // Chat functionality
            function openChat() {
                alert("Chat functionality coming soon!");
            }

            // Sign In functionality
document.getElementById('signin-form').addEventListener('submit', async function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const email = document.getElementById('signin-email').value;
    const password = document.getElementById('signin-password').value;
    
    try {
        const signIn = await clerk.client.signIn.create({
            identifier: email,
            password: password
        });
        
        await signIn.attemptFirstFactor({
            strategy: 'password',
            password: password
        });
        
        alert('Signed in successfully!');
        showSection('home');
    } catch (error) {
        alert('Error: ' + (error.errors?.[0]?.message || error.message));
    }
});

            // Sign Up functionality
        
document.getElementById('signup-form').addEventListener('submit', async function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const name = document.getElementById('signup-name').value;
    const email = document.getElementById('signup-email').value;
    const password = document.getElementById('signup-password').value;
    
    const firstName = name.split(' ')[0];
    const lastName = name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') || '';
    
    try {
        const signUp = await clerk.client.signUp.create({
            firstName: firstName,
            lastName: lastName,
            emailAddress: email,
            password: password
        });
        
        // Prepare verification
        await signUp.prepareVerification({
            strategy: 'email_code'
        });
        
        alert('Account created! Please check your email for a verification code.');
        
        // Prompt for verification code
        const code = prompt('Enter the verification code sent to your email:');
        if (code) {
            await signUp.attemptVerification({ code });
            alert('Email verified! You are now signed in.');
            showSection('home');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        alert('Error: ' + (error.errors?.[0]?.message || error.message));
    }
});
            // Initialize the page with the home section visible
            showSection("home");

            // Loyalty Program
            let loyaltyPoints = parseInt(localStorage.getItem("loyaltyPoints")) || 0;

            function updateLoyaltyDisplay() {
                const pointsElement = document.getElementById("loyalty-points");
                const progressElement = document.getElementById("loyalty-progress");
                pointsElement.textContent = loyaltyPoints;

                // Calculate progress towards next 100 points
                const progress = ((loyaltyPoints % 100) / 100) * 100;
                progressElement.style.width = `${progress}%`;
            }

            function addLoyaltyPoints(points) {
                loyaltyPoints += points;
                localStorage.setItem("loyaltyPoints", loyaltyPoints);
                updateLoyaltyDisplay();
            }

            function redeemReward(requiredPoints) {
                if (loyaltyPoints >= requiredPoints) {
                    loyaltyPoints -= requiredPoints;
                    localStorage.setItem("loyaltyPoints", loyaltyPoints);
                    updateLoyaltyDisplay();
                    alert(`Successfully redeemed ${requiredPoints} points!`);
                } else {
                    alert(`You need ${requiredPoints - loyaltyPoints} more points to redeem this reward.`);
                }
            }

            // Initialize loyalty display
            updateLoyaltyDisplay();

            // Toggle Product Details
            let selectedProduct = null;
            let selectedSize = null;
            let selectedColor = null;

            function toggleDetails(product) {
                selectedProduct = product;
                document.getElementById("details-title").textContent = product.name;
                document.getElementById("details-fabric").textContent = product.fabric;
                document.getElementById("details-care").textContent = product.care;

                // Size options
                const sizeOptions = document.getElementById("size-options");
                sizeOptions.innerHTML = product.sizes
                    .map((size) => `<div class="size-option" onclick="selectSize('${size}', this)">${size}</div>`)
                    .join("");

                // Color options
                const colorOptions = document.getElementById("color-options-popup");
                colorOptions.innerHTML = product.colors
                    .map(
                        (color) =>
                            `<span class="color-option" style="background-color: ${color.toLowerCase()}" 
         onclick="selectColor('${color}', this)"></span>`
                    )
                    .join("");

                // Initialize the thumbnail with the default image
                const thumbnailImage = document.getElementById("thumbnail-image");
                thumbnailImage.src = product.image;

                // Show the popup
                document.getElementById("product-details-popup").classList.add("active");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.add("active");
            }

            // Initialize cart count on page load
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
                updateCartIcon();
                updateCartDisplay();
            });
            // JavaScript to toggle dropdown
            // Function to close all dropdowns
            function closeAllDropdowns() {
                const dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll(".dropdown-content");
                dropdowns.forEach((dropdown) => {
                    dropdown.style.display = "none";
                });
            }

            // Function to toggle a dropdown
            function toggleDropdown(section) {
                const dropdown = document.getElementById(`${section}-dropdown`);

                // Close all dropdowns first
                closeAllDropdowns();

                // Toggle the clicked dropdown
                if (dropdown.style.display === "block") {
                    dropdown.style.display = "none";
                } else {
                    dropdown.style.display = "block";
                }
            }
            // Event listener to close dropdowns when clicking outside
            document.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
                const dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll(".dropdown-content");
                const dropdownTriggers = document.querySelectorAll(".dropdown > a");

                // Check if the click is outside any dropdown or its trigger
                let isClickInsideDropdown = false;
                dropdowns.forEach((dropdown) => {
                    if (dropdown.contains(event.target)) {
                        isClickInsideDropdown = true;
                    }
                });
                dropdownTriggers.forEach((trigger) => {
                    if (trigger.contains(event.target)) {
                        isClickInsideDropdown = true;
                    }
                });

                // If the click is outside, close all dropdowns
                if (!isClickInsideDropdown) {
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                }
            });
            // Lightbox Functions

            let autoSlideInterval; // Store the auto-slide interval

            // Updated openLightbox to handle multiple images with auto-slide
            function openLightbox(index, sectionId) {
                const section = document.getElementById(sectionId);
                if (!section) return;

                currentImageIndex = index;
                currentImageArray = [];

                if (sectionId === "search-results") {
                    // Handle search results section
                    const allProducts = [...products.trending, ...products.men, ...products.women, ...products.kids];
                    const product = allProducts[index];
                    if (!product) return;

                    // Add the main image
                    currentImageArray.push(product.image);

                    // Add additional images if they exist
                    if (product.additionalImages) {
                        currentImageArray.push(...product.additionalImages);
                    }

                    // Add color-specific images if they exist
                    if (product.colorImages) {
                        for (const color in product.colorImages) {
                            currentImageArray.push(product.colorImages[color]);
                        }
                    }
                } else if (sectionId === "home-arrivals-products") {
                    // Home arrivals mirrors the trending/new-arrival products
                    const product = products.trending[index];
                    if (!product) return;

                    // Add the main image
                    currentImageArray.push(product.image);

                    // Add additional images if they exist
                    if (product.additionalImages) {
                        currentImageArray.push(...product.additionalImages);
                    }

                    // Add color-specific images if they exist
                    if (product.colorImages) {
                        for (const color in product.colorImages) {
                            currentImageArray.push(product.colorImages[color]);
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    // Handle other sections (trending, men, women, kids)
                    const category = products[sectionId.replace("-products", "")];
                    if (!category) return;
                    const product = category[index];
                    if (!product) return;

                    // Add the main image
                    currentImageArray.push(product.image);

                    // Add additional images if they exist
                    if (product.additionalImages) {
                        currentImageArray.push(...product.additionalImages);
                    }

                    // Add color-specific images if they exist
                    if (product.colorImages) {
                        for (const color in product.colorImages) {
                            currentImageArray.push(product.colorImages[color]);
                        }
                    }
                }

                const lightboxImg = document.getElementById("lightbox-img");
                lightboxImg.src = "";
                showSpinner();
                lightboxImg.src = currentImageArray[currentImageIndex];
                generateThumbnails();
                document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.remove("hidden");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.add("active");

                if (autoSlideInterval) clearInterval(autoSlideInterval);
                autoSlideInterval = setInterval(nextImage, 3000);
            }

            // Function to show the next image in the lightbox
            function nextImage() {
                currentImageIndex = (currentImageIndex + 1) % currentImageArray.length;
                const lightboxImg = document.getElementById("lightbox-img");
                lightboxImg.src = currentImageArray[currentImageIndex];
                generateThumbnails();
            }

            function closeLightbox() {
                document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.add("hidden");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.remove("active");
                currentImageArray = []; // Clear the image array
                if (autoSlideInterval) clearInterval(autoSlideInterval); // Stop the auto-slide
            }

            function changeImage(direction) {
                currentImageIndex += direction;
                if (currentImageIndex < 0) {
                    currentImageIndex = currentImageArray.length - 1;
                } else if (currentImageIndex >= currentImageArray.length) {
                    currentImageIndex = 0;
                }
                updateLightboxImage();
                generateThumbnails(); // Ensure thumbnails are updated
            }

            function changeImageTo(index) {
                currentImageIndex = index;
                updateLightboxImage();
            }

            function updateLightboxImage() {
                const lightboxImg = document.getElementById("lightbox-img");
                const lightboxThumbnails = document.getElementById("lightbox-thumbnails").querySelectorAll("img");
                lightboxImg.src = "";
                showSpinner();
                lightboxImg.src = currentImageArray[currentImageIndex];
                lightboxThumbnails.forEach((img, idx) => {
                    img.classList.toggle("active", idx === currentImageIndex);
                });
            }

            function showSpinner() {
                document.getElementById("spinner").classList.remove("hidden");
            }

            function hideSpinner() {
                document.getElementById("spinner").classList.add("hidden");
            }

            function generateThumbnails() {
                const lightboxThumbnails = document.getElementById("lightbox-thumbnails");
                lightboxThumbnails.innerHTML = currentImageArray
                    .map(
                        (src, idx) => `
        <img src="${src}" alt="Thumbnail ${idx + 1}" onclick="changeImageTo(${idx})" class="${idx === currentImageIndex ? "active" : ""}">
    `
                    )
                    .join("");
            }

            // Share and Download Functions

            function downloadImage() {
                const link = document.createElement("a");
                link.href = currentImageArray[currentImageIndex];
                link.download = currentImageArray[currentImageIndex].substring(
                    currentImageArray[currentImageIndex].lastIndexOf("/") + 1
                );
                document.body.appendChild(link);
                link.click();
                document.body.removeChild(link);
            }

            function shareImage() {
                const shareData = {
                    title: "Check out this image!",
                    text: "Found this image while browsing. Check it out!",
                    url: currentImageArray[currentImageIndex]
                };

                if (navigator.share) {
                    navigator.share(shareData).catch((error) => {
                        alert(`Error sharing: ${error.message}`);
                    });
                } else {
                    alert("Your browser does not support the Web Share API.");
                }
            }
            function closeDetailsPopup() {
                document.getElementById("product-details-popup").classList.remove("active");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.remove("active");

                // Reset selected product, size, and color
                selectedProduct = null;
                selectedSize = null;
                selectedColor = null;

                // Reset the size options UI
                document.querySelectorAll(".size-option").forEach((opt) => opt.classList.remove("selected"));

                // Reset the color options UI
                document
                    .querySelectorAll("#color-options-popup .color-option")
                    .forEach((opt) => (opt.style.borderColor = "#ccc"));
            }

            // Add event listeners for closing the product details popup
            document.getElementById("close-btn").addEventListener("click", closeDetailsPopup);
            document.getElementById("overlay").addEventListener("click", closeDetailsPopup);
            // Image Zoom Functionality

            document.querySelector(".zoom-container").addEventListener("click", function () {
                this.classList.toggle("zoomed");
            });

            document.getElementById("overlay").addEventListener("click", closeLightbox);
            document.getElementById("close-btn").addEventListener("click", closeLightbox);
            // Add the new preview function for search results
            function openProductPreview(event, imgSrc) {
                // Remove any existing zoom effect before showing the preview
                if (document.querySelector(".zoom-container")) {
                    document.querySelector(".zoom-container").classList.remove("zoomed");
                }

                // Create preview overlay
                const preview = document.createElement("div");
                preview.classList.add("preview-overlay");

                // Create the image element
                const img = document.createElement("img");
                img.src = imgSrc;
                img.style.maxWidth = "400px"; // Limit image width
                img.style.maxHeight = "400px"; // Limit image height
                img.style.width = "auto"; // Maintain aspect ratio
                img.style.height = "auto";
                img.style.borderRadius = "10px";
                img.style.objectFit = "contain"; // Prevent zooming/stretching

                // Add image to preview
                preview.appendChild(img);
                document.body.appendChild(preview);

                // Close preview when clicking outside the image
                preview.addEventListener("click", () => {
                    document.body.removeChild(preview);
                });
            }
            /* Fix JavaScript preview/zoom functions */
            function previewImage(imageElement) {
                const previewContainer = document.querySelector(".preview-container");
                const previewImage = document.querySelector(".preview-container img");

                if (previewContainer && previewImage) {
                    previewImage.src = imageElement.src;
                    previewContainer.style.display = "block";
                    previewImage.style.transform = "none"; // Prevent zoom-in effect
                    previewImage.style.zoom = "1"; // Reset zoom level
                }
            }
            function closePreview() {
                const previewContainer = document.querySelector(".preview-container");
                if (previewContainer) {
                    previewContainer.style.display = "none";
                }
            }
            function closeAllDropdowns() {
                const dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll(".dropdown-content");
                dropdowns.forEach((dropdown) => {
                    dropdown.style.display = "none";
                });
            }
            function closeDetailsPopup() {
                // Reset selected product, size, and color
                selectedProduct = null;
                selectedSize = null;
                selectedColor = null;

                // Reset the size options UI
                document.querySelectorAll(".size-option").forEach((opt) => opt.classList.remove("selected"));

                // Reset the color options UI
                document
                    .querySelectorAll("#color-options-popup .color-option")
                    .forEach((opt) => (opt.style.borderColor = "#ccc"));

                // Hide the popup
                document.getElementById("product-details-popup").classList.remove("active");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.remove("active");
            }

            function selectSize(size, element) {
                selectedSize = size;
                document.querySelectorAll(".size-option").forEach((opt) => opt.classList.remove("selected"));
                if (element) {
                    element.classList.add("selected");
                }

                // If you have size-specific images, update the thumbnail here
                // Example:
                // const thumbnailImage = document.getElementById('thumbnail-image');
                // thumbnailImage.src = selectedProduct.sizeImages[size];
            }

            function selectColor(color, element) {
                selectedColor = color;
                document
                    .querySelectorAll("#color-options-popup .color-option")
                    .forEach((opt) => (opt.style.borderColor = "#ccc"));
                if (element) {
                    element.style.borderColor = "#000";
                }

                // Update the thumbnail image based on the selected color
                const thumbnailImage = document.getElementById("thumbnail-image");
                if (selectedProduct.colorImages && selectedProduct.colorImages[color]) {
                    thumbnailImage.src = selectedProduct.colorImages[color];
                } else {
                    // Fallback to the default image if no color-specific image is found
                    thumbnailImage.src = selectedProduct.image;
                }
            }
            function addToCartWithOptions() {
                if (!selectedSize || !selectedColor) {
                    alert("Please select size and color");
                    return;
                }

                addToCart(selectedProduct, selectedSize, selectedColor);
                document.getElementById("product-details-popup").classList.remove("active");
                document.getElementById("overlay").classList.remove("active");
            }
            function initializeAutoSlideshow() {
                const productContainers = document.querySelectorAll(".product-image-container");

                productContainers.forEach((container) => {
                    const imgElement = container.querySelector("img");
                    const imageData = imgElement.getAttribute("data-images");

                    if (imageData) {
                        const images = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(imageData));
                        let currentIndex = 0;

                        // Start auto-slideshow for this product
                        setInterval(() => {
                            currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % images.length;
                            imgElement.src = images[currentIndex];
                        }, 3000); // Change image every 3 seconds
                    }
                });
            }

            // Function to generate and display the membership card
            function generateMembershipCard() {
    if (!isUserLoggedIn()) {
        alert('You must be logged in to view your membership card.');
        showSubSection('signin');
        return;
    }

    const user = clerk.user;
    const memberId = generateMemberId();
    const joinDate = user.createdAt ? new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString() : new Date().toLocaleDateString();
    const loyaltyPoints = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('loyaltyPoints')) || 0;

    document.getElementById('member-id').textContent = memberId;
    document.getElementById('member-points').textContent = loyaltyPoints;
    document.getElementById('join-date').textContent = joinDate;

    document.getElementById('membership-card').classList.remove('hidden');
}
            // Function to download the membership card as an image
            function downloadMembershipCard() {
                const cardContainer = document.getElementById("membership-card-container");
                html2canvas(cardContainer).then((canvas) => {
                    const link = document.createElement("a");
                    link.href = canvas.toDataURL("image/png");
                    link.download = "membership-card.png";
                    link.click();
                });
            }

            // Account section click handler
document.querySelector('a[onclick="showSection(\'account\')"]').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    const user = clerk?.user;

    if (!user) {
        alert('You must be logged in to view your membership card.');
        showSubSection('signin');
    } else {
        generateMembershipCard();
    }
});
            function openPreview(imageSrc) {
                const previewOverlay = document.createElement("div");
                previewOverlay.classList.add("preview-overlay");

                const previewImage = document.createElement("img");
                previewImage.src = imageSrc;

                previewOverlay.appendChild(previewImage);
                document.body.appendChild(previewOverlay);

                // Close preview on click
                previewOverlay.addEventListener("click", () => {
                    document.body.removeChild(previewOverlay);
                });
            }

            // Add event listeners to product images
            document.querySelectorAll(".product img").forEach((img) => {
                img.addEventListener("click", () => openPreview(img.src));
            });
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
                const lazyImages = document.querySelectorAll("img.lazy-load");

                const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
                    entries.forEach((entry) => {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            const img = entry.target;
                            img.src = img.dataset.src;
                            img.classList.remove("lazy-load");
                            observer.unobserve(img);
                        }
                    });
                });

                lazyImages.forEach((img) => {
                    observer.observe(img);
                });
            });
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
                const lazyImages = document.querySelectorAll("img.lazy-load");

                const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
                    entries.forEach((entry) => {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            const img = entry.target;
                            img.src = img.dataset.src;
                            img.classList.remove("lazy-load");
                            observer.unobserve(img);
                        }
                    });
                });

                lazyImages.forEach((img) => {
                    observer.observe(img);
                });
            });
            
           function isUserLoggedIn() {
    return clerk && clerk.user !== null;
}
        </script>
    </body>
</html>
